TOOS, Israaiil oo cirka ka duqeynaysa Bayruut iyo Tehran iyo Maraykanka oo sheegay in duqeymaha Iiran ay si weyn u kordhi doonaan
You’re viewing a text-only version of this website that uses less data. View the main version of the website including all images and videos.
Israaiil waxay weerarro cusub ku qaaday Tehran iyo Bayruut, iyadoo ilaalada kacaanka Iiran (IRGC) ay sheegeen inay gantaallo ku rideen Tel Aviv, markii dagaalku uu galay maalintii toddobaad
Dowladda Soomaaliya ayaa ku dhawaaqday muddo kororsi hal sano ah, taasi oo uu siinayo dastuurka cusub ee Arbacadii la meel mariyay in muddo xileedka hay’adaha dowladda uu yahay 5 sano, sida uu sheegay guddoomiyaha baarlamanka Aadan Madoobe.
‘’Baarlamaanka wuxuu shaqayn doonaa inta dastuurka uu tilmaamay. Dastuurka kan hadda la ansixiyay inta uu tilmaamay buu baarlamanku joogi doonaa. Kii KMG ma aha yaah… Dastuurka rasmiga ah inta uu tilmaamay ayuu baarlamanka shaqeyn doonaa iyo hay’adaha dastuuriga ah’’
Xildhibaanada ka maqan fadhiyada baarlamanka ayuu ugu baaqay inay soo xaadiraan kulamada goloha si loo sii waddo shaqooyinka muddada sanandka ee haatan uu sheegay Madoobe inuu ugu oggolaanayo dastuurka cusub ee 222 xildhibaan ay u codeeyeen.
‘’Kalfadhiyada noo harsan Insha Allaah shuruuc badan oo laga gaari waayay iyo waxyaabo badan oo dowlad dhiska kamid ah fadhiyada noo harsan samayn doonaa, xoogaa fursad ah ayaan siinaynaa xildhibaanada, fasaxa waan u dheeraynaynaa si si ay cibaadada usoo gutaan. Xildhibaanadii la ganaaxayna waxay lamid yihiin xildhibaanada kale… imaada ganaaxiini waa dhammaaday’’
Ciidamada Israa’iil ayaa sheegay in weerarradoodii habeenkii hore ay ku beegsadeen waxa ay ugu yeereen “kaabayaasha nidaamka” ee Tehran. Waxay sidoo kale sheegeen inay weerarayaan “kaabayaasha Hezbollah” ee meelaha xoogga badan ee kooxda hubeysan ku leeyihiin Bayruut.
Milatariga Israaiil ayaa xoogga saaraya waxa ay ku tilmaamayaan “tallaabo isku duuban” iyo “iskaashi taariikhi ah oo dhab ah” oo ay la leeyihiin ciidamada Maraykanka.
Taliyaha guud ee Ciidanka Israaiil, Eyal Zamir, ayaa sheegay in wejigii hore ee “weerarka lama filaan ah” uu ku lug lahaa helitaanka “ku awood roonaanta cirka” iyo weerar lagu qaaday goobaha gantaallada. Wuxuu sheegay in wejiga xiga uu jiri doono “lama filaano dheeraad ah” si “si kale loogu burburiyo nidaamka.”
Habeenkii, diyaaradaha dagaalka Israaiil ayaa fuliyay mowjad afraad iyo tobnaad ee weerarada Iran tan iyo Sabtida, iyadoo duqeymo culus laga soo sheegay Tehran iyo magaalooyin kale. Khamiistii, qaylo digniin u ah gantaallada Iran ayaa si isdaba joog ah uga dhawaaqayay Israaiil, iyadoo mid ka mid ah weerarrada la isticmaalay gantaal leh madaxa kooxaysan – in kastoo dhaawac la soo sheegin.
Lubnaan, qaraxyo dheeraad ah ayaa ka dhacay Bayruut koonfureed habeenkii, ka dib markii milatariga Israaiil uu digniino siiyay dadka inay ka baxaan xaafado dhan – taasoo abuurtay xaalado cabsi ah.
Madaxweynaha Maraykanka, Donald Trump, ayaa u sheegay NBC News in hadda ay tahay “wakhti lumis” in ciidamada Maraykanka loo diro Iiran, islamarkaana aysan ahayn wax uu hadda ka fikiraayo.
“Wakhti lumis ayey tahay. Waxay lumiyeen wax walba. Waxay lumiyeen ciidamada badda. Wax walba oo ay lumi karaan way lumiyeen,” ayuu Trump u sheegay NBC Khamiistii.
Wuxuu intaas ku daray in hadalladii hore ee Abbas Araghchi uu NBC ku sheegay in Iiran diyaar u tahay in la weeraro ciidanka dhulka ee Maraykanka ama Israa'iil ay ahayd “hadal waqti lumis ah”.
Trump sidoo kale wuxuu sheegay inuu doonayo inuu nadiifiyo qaab-dhismeedka hogaaminta Iran ee hadda jirta.
“Waxaan rabnaa inay yeeshaan hogaamiye wanaagsan. Waxaan haynaa dad qaar oo aan u maleynayo inay shaqo fiican qaban doonaan,” ayuu yiri, isagoo aan magacaabin qof gaar ah.
Warbixino ayaa sheegaya in duqeymo habeenkii ka dhacay Bariga Dhexe, iyadoo dagaalka u dhaxeeya Maraykanka‑Israa'iil oo isku dhinac ah l iyo Iiran uu galay maalintii toddobaad.
Inta lagu jiro dagaalkan, wariyayaasha BBC ayaa loo diray guud ahaan Bariga Dhexe. In kasta oo aanay joogin gudaha Iiraan, haddana saaxiibadeen ayaa ku guuleystay inay la xiriiraan qaar ka mid ah dadka gudaha dalka inkastoo internet-ka uu goo go’ayay.
Waa qaar ka mid ah waxa dadka dhulka joogay ay noo sheegeen:
Haddii aad hadda kusoo biirtay, kuwan waa horumarradii ugu muhiimsanaa ee saacadihii u dambeeyay:
Wasaaradda Maaliyadda ee Maraykanka ayaa si ku-meel-gaar ah u fududeysay cunaqabataynta si Hindiya loogu oggolaado inay iibsato saliid Ruush ah oo hadda ku xanniban badda.
Xoghayaha Maaliyadda, Scott Bessent, ayaa sheegay in oggolaanshahan 30-maalmood ah uu u saamaxayo saliidda inay sii gasho suuqa caalamiga ah, isla markaana uu “yareyn doono cadaadiska ka dhashay isku dayga Iiraan ay ku doonayso inay tamarta caalamka u afduubnaato.”
Tallaabadan, ayuu Bessent ku sheegay bartiisa X, inay tahay “go’aan si ula kac ah u ah oo ku-meel-gaar ah,” isla markaana “aan siin doonin faa’iido dhaqaale oo weyn dowladda Ruushka,” maadaama ay khusayso oo keliya saliid horay badda ugu xannibnayd.
Madaxweynaha Maraykanka Donald Trump ayaa cunaqabatayn saaray saliidda Ruushka kadib duullaankii Moscow ku qaaday Ukraine, taas oo ku qasabtay iibsadayaasha inay raadiyaan ilo kale oo saliid ah.
Washington ayaa si gaar ah cadaadis u saartay Hindiya—oo ah iibsade weyn oo tamarta Ruushka ah—si ay u joojiso iibsashada saliidda Ruushka, si loo yareeyo lacagta loo isticmaalo maalgelinta duullaanka.
Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga ee Qatar ayaa sheegtay in ciidanka cirka ee dalkaasi ay si guul leh u joojiyeen weerar ay fulinayeen diyaarado aan duuliye lahayn (drone) oo lagu bartilmaameedsaday saldhigga cirka ee Al-Udeid, kaas oo ah saldhigga ugu weyn ee ciidanka Maraykanka ku leeyihiin Bariga Dhexe.
Warkan ayaa yimid ka dib markii dowladda Qatar ay hore digniino amni ugu dirtay taleefoonnada gacanta ee dadka ku nool dalka, iyagoo uga digay dadka inay ka fogaadaan daaqadaha iyo meelaha bannaan.
Xisbullah ayaa uga digtay dadka Israa’iil ee deggan magaalooyinka ku jira 5 km (3 mayl) gudaha xadka Lubnaan inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan.
Digniintan ayaa lagu baahiyay fariin lagu qoray afka Cibraaniga oo lagu daabacay kanaalka Telegram ee ururka subaxnimadii Jimcaha hore, sida ay sheegtay Reuters.
“Duullaanka ay ciidankiinnu ku hayaan madaxbannaanida Lubnaan iyo muwaadiniinta nabadda ah, burburinta kaabayaasha rayidka, iyo ololeyaasha barakicinta ee aad waddaan ma ahaan doonaan kuwo aan jawaab laga bixin,” ayay tidhi Xisbullah.
Ciidamada Israa’iil ayaa bilaabay mowjad weerarro ah oo ka dhan ah Lubnaan fiidkii Khamiista, kadib markii ay dadka ku amreen inay ka baxaan xaafadaha koonfureed ee magaalada Beyruut, oo ah goob ay si weyn uga xooggan tahay Xisbullah.
Wax yar ka horna, ciidanka Israa’iil (IDF) ayaa sidoo kale sheegay inay bilaabeen “mowjad ballaaran oo weerarro ah oo lagu beegsanayo kaabayaasha nidaamka argagixisada ee Iran ee magaalada Tehran.”
Wasiirka arrimaha dibadda ee Iran, Abbas Araqchi, ayaa wareysi uu siiyay NBC ku sheegay in Iiraan aysan dalban xabbad-joojin ama wada-xaajood ay la gasho Maraykanka
“Xaqiiqadu waxay tahay inaanan lahayn waayo-aragnimo wanaagsan oo ku saabsan wada-xaajood lala yeesho Mareykanka, gaar ahaan maamulka hadda jira. Waxaan wada-xaajoonnay laba jeer sanadkii hore iyo sanadkan, waxaana dhexda wada-xaajoodka ay nagu qaadeen weerar,” ayuu yiri Araqchi.
Wasiirka arrimaha dibadda ee Iiraan ayaa sidoo kale sheegay inuusan wax xidhiidh ah la yeelan Steve Witkoff ama Jared Kushner tan iyo toddobaadkii hore.
Isagoo ka jawaabaya su’aal ku saabsan suuragalnimada weerar dhulka ah oo Mareykanku ku qaado iyo sida Iiraan uga falcelin doonto, ayuu sheegay in ciidamada milatariga ee dalkiisu ay sugayaan iska horimaad dhulka ah oo ay la galaan askarta Mareykanka, sababtoo ah sida uu sheegay “waxaan ku kalsoonahay inaan la tacaali karno, taasina waxay u noqon doontaa musiibo weyn.”
Wuxuu sidoo kale ka hadlay weerarrada Iiraan ku qaaday dalalka gobolka, isagoo yiri: “Waxaan beegsanay bartilmaameedyo Mareykan ah iyo saldhigyo iyo xarumo Mareykan ah oo nasiib darro ku yaalla dhulka dalalka deriska nala ah.”
Wasiirka arrimaha dibadda ayaa sidoo kale ka hadlay weerar Mareykanku ku qaaday markabka IRIS Dena, kaas oo sababay dhimashada 87 badmaax oo ku sugnaa Badweynta Hindiya. Wuxuu yiri: “Markabka ku degay Badweynta Hindiya ma uusan hubaysnayn, wuxuuna siday saraakiil tababar ku jiray. Weerarka markabkan waxaa loo arkaa dambi dagaal, waxuuna ficilkaas Mareykanku ku abuuray xaalad aad u halis ah.”
Wasiirka ayaa sidoo kale ka hadlay taageerada milatari ee ay Iiraan ka helayso Shiinaha iyo Ruushka, isagoo sheegay: “Iskaashiga milatari ee naga dhexeeya Ruushka muddo dheer ayuu ahaa mid si fagaare ah loo ogaa.” Si kastaba ha ahaatee, wuxuu sheegay inuusan bixin doonin faahfaahin dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan iskaashigaas sababo la xiriira xaaladda dagaalka.
Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha ee Bahrain ayaa sheegtay in laba hoteel iyo dhisme la deggan yahay oo ku yaal caasimadda Manama lagu bartilmaameedsaday weerar ay fulisay Iran.
Weerarkan ugu dambeeyay wuxuu sababay “khasaare hantiyeed balse ma jiro wax dhimasho ah”, ayay Wasaaradda Arrimaha Guduhu ku sheegtay qoraal ay ku daabacday X.
Horaantii toddobaadkan, saldhigga ciidanka badda ee Maraykanka ee ku yaal Bahrain ayaa sidoo kale lagu weeraray gantaallo ay ridday Iran.
Maraykanka ayaa amar ku bixiyay in la daadgureeyo safaaraddiisa ku taalla Kuwait, sida ay werisay CBS News, oo bahwadaag la’ah BBC-da.
Daadgureyntan ayaa la qorsheeyay inay dhacdo habeenka u dhexeeya illaa Jimcaha, waxaana shaqaalaha safaaradda lagu amray inay burburiyaan xogta iyo inay tirtiraan keydadka xogaha sirta ah, sida ay laba sarkaal oo Mareykan ah u sheegeen CBS.
Amarka daadgureynta ayaa yimid xilli ciidanka Kuwait ay sheegeen in difaacooda cirka ay iska caabiyeen weerar gantaal ah oo soo galay hawada dalka.
“Hawlgalkii lagu soo riday gantaalka wuxuu sababay in qaar ka mid ah burburka uu dhulka ku dhaco, taasoo keentay khasaare yar oo hanti ah oo ku koobnaa dhaawac soo gaaray hal gaari, iyadoo aan wax dhaawac ah oo dad ah la diiwaangelin,” ayuu ku qoray afhayeen u hadlay milatariga Kuwait bayaan lagu daabacay X.
Halkan waxaa ku qoran qodobbada ugu muhiimsan ee laga soo qaatay hadal jeedintii ay dadweynaha u sameeyeen saacadihii la soo dhaafay Wasiirka Gaashaandhigga Maraykanka Pete Hegseth, Madaxa Taliska Dhexe ee Maraykanka Brad Cooper, iyo madaxweynaha Maraykanka Donald Trump:
Waxaan quusinay in ka badan 30 markab oo Iiraan ah, sida uu sheegay madaxa Taliska Dhexe ee Maraykanka
Hadda waxaan ka maqaleynaa madaxa Taliska Dhexe , Admiral Brad Cooper.
Wuxuu sheegay in 72-kii saac ee la soo dhaafay, Maraykanku uu beegsaday ku dhowaad 200 bartilmaameed oo ku yaal Iiraan.
Sidoo kale wuxuu sheegay in Maraykanku ilaa hadda quusiyey in ka badan 30 markab oo Iiraan leedahay.
“Saacadihii ugu dambeeyay oo keliya, waxaan garaacnay markab Iiraan leedahay oo qaada diyaaradaha aan duuliyaha lahayn (drones), kaas oo cabbir ahaan la mid ah markabkii diyaaradaha qaadi jiray ee dagaalkii labaad ee aduunka. Hadda oo aan hadlayno, markabkaa wuu gubanayaa.”
Xoghayaha Difaaca Maraykanka Pete Hegseth ayaa hadda bilaabay warbixin ku saabsan khilaafka ka socda Xarunta Taliska Dhexe ee Maraykanka (US Central Command). Wuxuu sheegay in howlgalka Maraykanka ee Iiraan uu “si go’aan leh u socdo”.
“Iiraan waxay rajaynaysaa inaanan awoodin inaan sii wadno arrintan, taasina waa xisaab aad u khaldan,” ayuu yidhi
Hegseth ayaa wariyeyaasha u sheegay in Maraykanku uusan “in uusan wax gabaabsi ah oo hubka iyo rasaasta” ku saabsan, isla markaana Maraykanku uu awood u leeyahay inuu sii wado ololihiisa inta uu u baahdo.
“Waxaan kaliya hadda bilownay dagaalka, waxaana u dagaallamaynaa si go’aan leh,” ayuu intaa ku daray.
Madaxweynaha Maraykanka Donald Trump ayaa ka hadlay munaasabad ka dhacday Aqalka Cad, isagoo bixinaya war cusub oo ku saabsan Iiraan.
Wuxuu sheegay in ciidamada Maraykanka, oo ay weheliyaan Israel, ay “si buuxda u burburinayaan” bartilmaameedyada Iiraan, isla markaana hawlgalku uu ka socdo “si ka horreysa jadwalkii loo qorsheeyay”.
Trump ayaa sheegay in ay jireen “47 sano oo cabsi iyo dhibaato leh” oo lala soo maray dowladda Iiraan, isagoo ku eedeeyay nidaamkaas inuu waxyeello u geystay shacabka Iiraan ee aan waxba galabsan.
“Dadkeenna shaqo weyn ayay qabanayaan,” ayuu yidhi Trump.
Wuxuu intaa ku daray inuu leeyahay qorshe lagu xakameynayo qiimaha shidaalka inta uu khilaafkani socdo. Wuxuu sheegay in qiimaha shidaalku hore u hooseeyay, balse “waxaan ku qasbanaaday inaan qaado leexasho yar”.
Wuxuu sidoo kale sheegay in Maraykanku uu “saacad kasta” weerarayo awoodaha diyaaradaha aan duuliyaha lahayn (drone-yada) iyo gantaallada Iiraan.
“Sidaas darteed ma haystaan ciidan cirka ah, ma haystaan difaac cirka ah. Dhammaan diyaaradoodii way baaba’een, isgaarsiintoodiina way go’day,” ayuu yiri. “Marka laga reebo taas, si fiican bay u socdaan.”
Waxaan maqalnay in diyaarad Faransiis ah oo ku sii jeeday Bariga Dhexe si ay muwaadiniinteeda usoo daad gureyso lagu qasbay inay noqoto ka hor inta aysan gaarin sababtoo ah rasaas gantaallo ah oo ka dhacaysa gobolka.
Wasiirka Gaadiidka Faransiiska, Philippe Tabarot, ayaa sheegay in duulimaadka Air France ee qorshuhu ahaa inay soo qaado muwaadiniinta Faransiiska ee ku sugan Imaaraatka Carabta.
Mr Tabarot ayaa yidhi in ku noqoshada diyaaradda Faransiiska ay muujineyso xasilooni-darrada gobolka iyo sida ay u adag tahay in si nabad ah loo fuliyo howlaha dib-u-soo-celinta muwaadiniinta.
Caawa, digniino cusub oo taleefan ah ayaa loo diray dadka ku sugan Dubai, iyagoo ka digaya rasaasta Iiraan ee soo socota. Digniintii ayaa markii dambe la qaaday.
Madaxda Imaaraatka Carabta ayaa sheegay in lix gantaal Iiraan ah iyo in ka badan 100 drone la qabtay Khamiistii. Lama soo sheegin wax dhimasho ama dhaawac culus ah.
Maraykanku wuxuu joojiyay howlaha safaaradiisa caasimadda Kuwait, sida ay sheegtay Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda ee Maraykanka qoraal ay soo saartay.
Inkastoo aan la soo sheegin wax dhaawac ah oo soo gaaray shaqaalaha Maraykanka, Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda ayaa sheegtay in badbaadada Maraykanka ku sugan dibadda ay tahay mudnaanta koowaad.
“Muwaadiniinta Maraykanka ee ku sugan Kuwait waa inay ka baxaan dalka, haddii ay si nabad ah u samayn karaan, iyagoo adeegsanaya gaadiid ganacsi ama habab kale oo la heli karo. Muwaadiniinta Maraykanka ee aan ka bixi karin waa inay meel gabaad ah tagaan,” ayay ku dartay warbixintu
Beyruud haddeer waa u habeennimo, waxaanan la hadlaayay dad seexanaya waddooyinka dhinacyadooda iyo gawaaridooda ka dib markii lagu qasbay inay ka baxaan guryahooda ku yaalla xaafadaha koonfureed ee magaalada.
“Caawa gaarigeenna ayaan ku nagaaneynaa. Meel kale ma jiro. (Meelahii) gabaadku way buuxsameen,” ayuu yidhi nin isagoo qoyskiisa kula shishaynayay waddada dhexdeeda ee bartamaha Beyruud.
Dhinaca kale, haweeney 23-jir ah oo aan la fariisatay gabadheeda laba bilood jirka ah ayaa iii sheegtay inay si degdeg ah usoo carartay kadib markii Israel ay soo saartay amar aan horay loo arag oo ku amray boqollaal kun oo qof inay ka baxaan guryahooda.
“Kaliya xafaayado ayaan keenay. Xitaa caano ma keensan,” ayay tiri, iyadoo intaa ku dartay inay ka walwalsan tahay waxa habeenku keeni doono.
Haweeney kale oo ku sugneyd beerta, oo ka timid Dahieh oo ah xarun ay xoog ku leeyahiin kooxda Hezbollah ee taageerta Iiraan ayaa ooyday markay ka hadashay cabsi ay ka qabto waxa dhacaya.
“Waxaan la qabsaday dhawaaqa [bambaanooyinka] guriga. Ma doonayn inaan ka tago,” ayay tiri Monira Hassan.
“Ma garanayo waxa aan mar kale dhihi karo. Kaliya waxaan rabay inaan guriga ku sii nagaado.”
Qaar kale waxay muujiyeen taageeradooda Hezbollah, iyadoo nin sheegay inuusan ka baqayn inuu dhinto si uu “u difaaco una ilaaliyo dhulkayaga.”
Taliyaha guud ee Ciidamada Difaaca Israel ayaa sheegay in ay “u gudbayaan wejiga xiga ee howlgalkooda” ka dhanka ah Iiraan, isaga oo ku adkeeyay inay “sii burburin doonaan nidaamka iyo awoodihiisa milatari”.
Taliyaha guud ee IDF, Lt Gen Eyal Zamir, ayaa sheegay in Israel iyo Maraykanku ay “si istiraatiiji ah u go’iyeen Iiraan” isla markaana ay geeyeen meel daciifnimo ah “aan hore loo arag”.
Wuxuu sheegay in muddo lix maalmood ah Israel ay “weeraraysey Iiraan iyada oo aan hakad galin” iyo in “howlgalku uu socdo xawaaraha aan qorsheynay inuu ku socdo”.
Wuxuu qoraalkiisa ku yidhi: “Ka dib marka aan dhameystirno wejigii weerarka lama filaanka ahaa, kaas oo aan ku xaqiijinay sareynta cirka iyo inaan joojinnay nidaamka gantaallada, hadda waxaan u gudbaynaa wejiga xiga ee howlgalkiisa.
“Wejigan, waxaan sii burburin doonaa nidaamka iyo awoodihiisa milatari. Waxa jira lama filaan kale oo horey noo sugaya oo aanan damacsaneyn inaan shaaciyo.”
Qoraalkiisa ayaa sidoo kale u gudbay xaaladda Lubnaan, isagoo sheegay in Hezbollah ay sameysay “khalad istiraatiiji ah” markii ay ku biirtay dagaalka, ayna Israel “weerararo xoog leh ka wado, khadka hore iyo gudaha Lubnaan”.

Guidance: Links and feeds
The BBC's global reputation is based on its editorial integrity and independence. Our audiences need to be confident that decisions are influenced neither by political or commercial pressures, nor by any personal interests.
The Editorial Guidelines state that:
(See Editorial Guidelines Section 15 Independence from Commercial and other External Interests 15.4.22)
Whenever producers are creating content on a BBC site, they should actively consider which external websites it may be editorially justifiable to link to.
A link must never be included on the public service site or within the editorial content of a commercial site in return for cash, services or any other consideration in kind.
All links on the BBC Public Service site or on the editorial pages of a BBC Commercial site must be editorially justifiable and suitable for the intended audience – particularly children.
Links are not acceptable as a form of a credit.
Producers must check the contents of any site before adding a link to it on a BBC page, although responsibility for including the link lies with the relevant editor.
They should consider ways to enable users who find inappropriate external links to report them so that appropriate action can be taken.
A standard disclaimer to the effect that "the BBC is not responsible for the contents of any other sites listed" should be added to any published list of links. If the links are to controversial or challenging material, it may be appropriate to add a specific disclaimer and more information, closer to the links. For "in story" links to such material, for example to very sensitive content it may be helpful to alert the user to this, in context, as part of telling the story.
Context is important in deciding whether a link is appropriate and it is often useful to explain why one is included. In some cases, a link may be offered to a site which does not share BBC editorial values, but which offers a useful insight - for example from a current affairs page to the site of a government-run national news agency so that the user can see the precise words used in a government statement.
BBC sites which cover a controversial or public policy matter may offer links to external sites which, taken together, represent a reasonable range of views about the subject. When linking to third party sites any concerns about potential breaches of the law, for example, defamation or incitement to racial hatred should be considered.
Where content is likely to cause serious offence to some users and yet there is a strong editorial justification for covering the story, it may be editorially justifiable for the BBC to link to the relevant site rather than to host the content ourselves.
Links to charity sites have to be based on appropriate editorial criteria. If one charity is in the news, it may be appropriate to establish a link to the site of that charity. But one charity should not be promoted above another. Where the links give advice or general information about a subject significant charities working in the field should be included. This guidance applies to online links offered by BBC Action Lines.
(See Editorial Guidelines 15.4.28)
It is also important to consider where on the charity website we link to – for example it may be appropriate to link to useful sources of information, but not to campaigning or fundraising pages.
For programme support pages, an external linking should be justified by the relevance and value of the material to the programme's viewers and listeners. Links should be given to a reasonable range of relevant agencies.
Where a consumer programme reviews a product or service, links to the sites of the manufacturers, suppliers or retailers of any goods or services mentioned should only be offered where editorially justifiable
There must be no undue prominence of products, services or trade marks in BBC content.
(See Editorial Guidelines Section 15 Independence from Commercial and other External Interests 15.4.22)
Public Services must not endorse or promote any other organisation, or its products, services or trademarks, so great care must be taken when linking to any site in order not to give the impression that the BBC is doing so.
BBC Public Service sites should not normally link direct to pages whose main purpose is transactional e.g. selling merchandise, downloads or tickets.
There may be exceptions for links to buy BBC-related programme content or to buy tickets for BBC Events. There are some occasions producers may also wish to link directly to a donations page for a BBC charitable appeal.
(See Editorial Guidelines Section 16: External Relationships, including Commercial Relationships, and Financing 16.4.49)
If in any doubt, refer to Editorial Policy.
Links from individual pages on the Public Service site to the BBC's Commercial sites must be editorially justified. They should not be seen to promote the BBC's Commercial sites in preference to other editorially relevant sites
There may be a justification for linking to BBC Commercial sites where they feature relevant branded products or other transactional purposes.
(See Editorial Guidelines Section 15 Independence from Commercial and other External Interests 15.4.25-15.4.26)
Where appropriate, an interstitial page may appear on the user's journey between the Public Service site and the BBC's Commercial site. It will let users know that they are leaving the public service site and offer them a choice.
BBC programmes and sites regularly cover music concerts and tours. Linking policy to sites where users can buy tickets will depend on the nature of the event.
If it is a BBC mounted or run event (on the Public Services to contribute to the BBC's Mission and Public Purposes), then a direct link to the source of the tickets is likely to be editorially justifiable.
If it is not a BBC mounted or run event (and where for example a BBC network is simply broadcasting a concert organised by someone else) then a direct link to the relevant band's site is likely to be editorially justifiable, with one more click from there to the ticket agency's site.
Pulling third-party content onto BBC Online pages is more editorially sensitive than linking externally. Following an external link takes users away from the BBC site and users have a chance to adjust their expectations in the light of that journey. But as third party content sits with BBC content on BBC branded pages, users are more likely to expect it to have been through a rigorous editorial examination and to comply with BBC editorial standards before being published on our site.
The person who is editorially responsible for the page on which the feed or embed appears will be responsible for the content from that feed or embed. This principle will apply whether it is a bespoke feed to a single page or a general feed to many pages.
The BBC would not normally embed a live feed of video or text unless there was a contractual relationship with the supplier that provides assurances about the content or was otherwise confident that the content is appropriate to be shared on BBC platforms.
The BBC should be transparent about content that comes from an external supplier. Attribution should be as close as possible to the content in question.
There should be a clear and easy route for users to report a mistake or find offensive or inappropriate content on a feed.
Embedded video, for example of a social networking site video player such as YouTube BBC page, may be a useful way to display editorially relevant non-BBC content.
Even though the content is not under BBC control it appears to the audience that it is part of BBC online content. It should therefore be clear that the embedded video is from a third party site and give the audience a direct route to report any inappropriate content.

Maxaa ku dhacaya Maskaxda marka kubbadda lagu dhufto madaxa?
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Xirfadleyda kubbadda cagta iyo xiddigaha kubbadda cagta Maraykanka waxa ay halis badan ugu jiraan inuu ku dhaco xanuunka waalida in ka badan oo ka sarreysa xirfadleyaasha kale. Haddaba maxaa la sameyn karaa si loo caawiyo?
Marka aad tahay ciyaaryahan kubbadda cagta ah, ma jiro wax lala barbardhigi kara farxadda aad dareemeyso markaad hawada u booddo kubbad si xawaare sare kuugu soo socota, madaxa ku dhufato shabaqa taabato, una dhaliso gool kooxdaada.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, baaritaanno soo baxaya ayaa muujinaya in kubadda oo si joogto ah madax lagu dhufto ay sababi karto dhaawac maskaxeed oo soo baxa tobannaan sano kadib, iyaga oo u eg sida Alzheimers, Parkinson, iyo cudurrada neerfaha ku dhaca.
Halista ay leeyihiin ciyaaraha la isdhex-galo sida ciyaarta kubadda cagta waxa ahayd mid la ogyahay ku dhawaad boqol sano.
Sanadkii 1928, dhakhtar Maraykan ah oo baara xanuunnada, oo la oran jiray Harrison Martland ayaa daabacay warbixin cilmiyeed uu ku sheegay in "muddo dheer taageerayaasha iyo qabanqaabiyeyaasha feerka ay ogaayeen xaalad dhif ah oo ku dhacda ciyaartoyda feeryahannada ah, taas oo dadka feerka ciyaaraha ay yaqaanaan "feer-yahanka liicaya'."
Calaamadaha ugu waaweyn ee qofka isku arki karo waxaa kamid ah wareer iyo in uu jareeyo (gariiro), inta badanna waxaa la kulma feeryahannada inta badan madaxa laga feero.
Mararka qaar, xaaladdaas "feer-yahanka liicaya" waxay isku beddeshay 'asaasaq', taas oo markii dambe loo aqoonsaday "asaasaqa ka dhasha jugta maskaxda," waana nooc kamid ah xanuunnada ku dhaca feeryahannada la kulma jugta madaxa.
Bilowgii waxaa la moodayay in dhibaatadu ku kooban tahay feerka oo keliya, balse waxa arrintu isbeddeshay tobanaan sano kadib.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Sanadkii 2002, ciyaaryahankii West Bromwich Albion iyo xulka Ingiriiska Jeff Astall ayaa dhintay isagoo 59 jir ah, kadib waxaa la ogaaday inuu qabay xanuunka asaasaqa oo bilow ah.
Dalka Maraykanka, ciyaaryahankii kubbadda cagta Maraykanka Mike Webster ayaa si lama filaan ah u dhintay isagoo 50 jir ah, kadib markii uu la ildarnaa ilaawsho.
Labadaas qof baarintaannadii maskaxda ee lagu sameeyey ayaa muujiyay in ay u dhinteen cudur loo yaqaan "encephalopathy", xanuunnada ku dhaca maskaxda, inkasta oo hadda loo yaqaano burada maskaxda.
Willie Stewart, oo ah dhakhtar ku takhasusay cudurrada maskaxda kana tirsan Jaamacadda Glasgow ee Boqortooyada Ingiriiska, ayaa yiri:
"Encephalopathy-da dhaawaca joogtada ah waa nooc gaar ah oo cudur maskaxeed oo sii xumaanaya, sababtoo ah waxaan ku aragnaa oo keliya dadka hore ula kulmay dhaawacyo ama jugo madaxa ah."
Xaaladdan waxaa lagu ogaadaa marka mikroskoob lagu eego maskaxda, waana marka maskaxda lagu arko in ay ururineyso boroyiinka, xaaladdaas oo la dhaho tau.
Stewart wuxuu sheegay: "Habka ugu fudud ee lagu ogaan karo in qof laga shakiyo cudurkan waa in la weydiiyo: 'kubbadda cagta miyaad ciyaartaa, ama ciyaarta 'rugby'?' Sababtoo ah haddii aad tahay ciyaaryahan kubbadda cagta ciyaara oo qaba asaasaqa ama isku dhexyaaca, waxaa keeni kara jugta kaa soo gaartay".
Tan iyo 2008, Ann McKee, oo ah bare ku takhasusay neerfaha kana tirsan Jaamacadda Boston, ayaa ciyaartoydii hore ka codsaneesay in ay ka qayb qaataan cilmi-baaris lagu ogaanayo laguna daweynayo cudurkan.
Sanadkii 2023, McKee iyo asxaabteeda waxay baareen 376 ciyaaryahan hore, waxayna heleen in boqolkiiba 91.7 ay qabaan xanuun dhanka masxkaxda ah.
Kooxdan waxaa ka mid ahaa Rick Arrington oo ka tirsanaa Philadelphia Eagles intii u dhexeysay 1970 ilaa 1973, iyo Ed Lothamer oo ka tirsanaa Kansas City Chiefs una ciyaaray Super Bowl-kii ugu horreeyay.
Waxaa la rumeysan yahay in cudurkan uu ku yar yahay bulshada inteeda kale, inuu ku dhacana ay haslis ugu jiraan wax ka yar boqolkiiba hal.
McKee waxay sidoo kale cudurkan ka heshay ciyaartoy hore oo ciyaari jiray ciyaaraha baseball-ka, baaskiika , iyo ciyaarta barafka, dhammaan kiisaskaas, waxa ka dhexeeyay jug soo noqnoqotay oo madaxa ka gaartay.
Daraasad lagu sameeyay 2019 oo ku saabsan saameynta kubbadda cagta ee caafimaadka nolosha oo dhan, Stewart iyo kooxdiisu waxay baareen diiwaannada caafimaad ee ku dhowaad 8,000 ciyaaryahan hore oo Scottish ah, iyagoo la barbardhigay 23,000 qof oo ka tirsan qeybaha kale ee bulshada
Stewart waxa uu dhahay "Waxaan isbarbardhignay ciyaartoyda kubbadda cagta iyo dad la mid ah oo isla sannadkii dhashay kuna noolaa deegaanno isku mid ah."
Daraasadda ayaa muujisay in ciyaartoydii hore ay shan jeer uga halis badan yihiin Alzheimers, afar jeer uga halis badan yihiin cudurka neerfaha, isla markaana laba jeer uga halis badan yihiin masxkaxda, marka loo eego dadka kale ee isku da'da yihiin.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Stewart waxa uu sheegay in halistu badan tahay marka qofka uu mar kasta uu kubadda ku tuuro/herdiyo madaxa ama feer looga dhufto iwm.
Inkasta oo cudurkan badanaa la ogaado kadib marka uu qofka dhinto, hadana cilmi-baaris lagu sameeyay ciyaartoy da'yar ah ayaa muujisay calaamado lagu fahmi karo dhaawac dhanka maskaxda ah.
Michael Lipton, oo ah bare ku takhasusay sawirrada raajada caafimaadka ayaa sheegay in madaxa kubbadda lagu dhufto uu keeno in maskaxda deg deg dhaqdhaqaaqdo, taas oo kala jiidaysa neerfaha, waxa ay saameeneysaa fahmka maskaxda. Maskaxdu waa mid jilicsan, marka jug degdeg ah ku dhacdo, deg deg ayey u wareegtaa oo ay u qalloocataa, taas oo culays saaraysa neerfayaasha.
Yareynta kubbadda lagu dhufto madaxa, gaar ahaan tababarrada, iyo horumarinta qalabka badbaadada ayaa ka mid ah xalalka la soo jeediyay.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Maskaxda bini adaamka waxa ay ka kooban tahay xargo aad u dhuu-dhuuban, kuwaas oo haya shaqada guud ee maskaxda iyo neerfaha. sida uu sheegayo Dr. Lipyon. fiilooyinkaas waa kuwo aad u jilicsan oo haddii ay kulmaan jug ama darbo deg deg ah oo xogaan waxa ay noqon karaan kuwo shaqadooda wareerto ama ay maskaxdu dib ugu boodo gudaha qolofta madaxa, taas oo kala jiidda fiilooyinka neerfaha.
Lipton wuxuu yiri: "Haddii aad ka fikirto madaxa kubbadda lagu dhufto, saameynta ku dhacda madaxa waa mid khafiif ah ma keento jab lafta madaxa ah, dhiig-bax maskaxeed, ama dhaawac si cad loo arko laakiin waxa ay awood u leedahay in xoog ay gudaha ugu gudubto ayna wax yeeleyso maskaxda."
Ciyaartoyda sida joogtada ah madaxa looga dhufta kubbadda, gaar ahaan kuwa sheegay inay ku dhacdo arrintaan in ka badan 1,000 jeer sanadkii, waxay la kulmaan dhaawac aad uga weyn oo soo gaara maskaxda qeybta jilicsan.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images

Mikel Arteta: "Maalmihii wacnaa way soo socdaan"
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Tababaraha Arsenal, Mikel Arteta, ayaa sheegay in uu kulan la yeeshay ciyaartoydiisa kaddib guuldarradii ka soo gaartay Manchester United si uu u "dejiyo xamaasadda", isaga oo ballanqaaday in waxyaabo qurux badan ay weli soo socdaan.
Guuldarradii 3–2 ahayd ee ay Arsenal Axaddii kala kulantay United waxay noqotay guuldarradii ugu horreysay ee ay garoonkooda ku lumiyaan xilli ciyaareedkan, islamarkaana waxa ay ahayd tii saddexaad oo kaliya ee ay ku lumiyaan Horyaalka Premier League kaddib 23 kulan.
Gunners waxay weli afar dhibcood ka horraysaa Manchester City iyo Aston Villa, balse ma aysan gaadhin wax guul ah saddexdii kulan ee ugu dambeeyay ee horyaalka, kaddib barbaro ay la galeen Nottingham Forest iyo Liverpool.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, Arteta wuxuu sheegay in falcelintii kulanka kooxda ay ahayd mid "aad u wanaagsan", islamarkaana uu aaminsan yahay in taasi ay muujinayso rajo wanaagsan oo ku aaddan guulaha inta ka hadhsan xilli ciyaareedka.
"Waxaan qaadannay waqti aan ku dejinno xamaasadda oo aan sammaynno fiiro dheeraad ah, annagoo is weydiinayna laba su'aalood: tan koowaad waa, sidee ayaan dareemaynaa? Tan labaadna waa, sidee ayaan u wajahaynaa afarta bilood ee soo socda?"
"Waxay ahayd mid aad u dhiirrigelin badan oo qurux badan, sababtoo ah wixii ka soo baxay kulankaas waxay ahaayeen wax aad u fudud."
Tababaraha Arsenal ayaa farriintan ka jeediyay shir jaraa'id oo uu qabtay ka hor kulanka ay garoonkooda kula ciyaarayaan Kairat ee Champions League, kaas oo dhacaya Arbacada.
Arsenal waxay hoggaanka u hayaan tartanka Yurub, iyagoo guulaystay 7 kulan, halka martidooda ka imanaya Kazakhstan ay ku jiraan kaalinta ugu hooseysa ee group-ka.
Arteta wuxuu sheegay in uu kulammo la yeesho kooxdiisa "saddex ilaa afar jeer toddobaad kasta", wuxuuna tilmaamay in kulankii ugu dambeeyay uu ahaa si ciyaartoydu "u fahmaan meesha aan joogno" iyo si loo hubiyo in ay "ku raaxaystaan kalsooni buuxda, iyagoo og in guushu dhici doonto, maxaa yeelay waa waqtigeenna oo runtii waan dooneynaa."
Arsenal waxay saddex xilli ciyaareed oo isku xigta ku dhamaatay kaalinta labaad ee Premier League.
Gunners ma aysan qaadin koob tan iyo markii ay qaadday FA Cup 2020, taas oo ahayd xilli ciyaareedkii ugu horreeyay ee Arteta uu hogaamiyo kooxda.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Arteta wuxuu sheegay in cadaadis ka yimid dhinaca dibadda kooxda aanu sabab u noqon kulankaas.
Taa beddelkeeda, wuxuu u arkay waqti ku habboon in la qiimeeyo xaaladda kooxda kaddib jadwal "adag oo mashquul badan". Ka hor guuldarradii United, Arsenal waxay ciyaartay afar kulan oo ay ku dheeshay bannaanka gurigeeda oo isku xiga, kuwaas oo ka dhacay afar tartan oo kala duwan.
Waxay guuleysteen saddex ka mid ah afar ciyaar oo bannaanka ah, halka mid kalena barbaro ay galeen, waxayna hoggaanka u hayaan Premier League, waxay leeyihiin rikoodh 100% ah dhinaca Champions League, waxay hoggaanka u hayaan Chelsea ka dib lugta koowaad ee semi-final-ka Carabao Cup, islamarkaana waxay gaadheen wareegga afaraad ee FA Cup.
Arteta wuxuu sheegay in "waxyaabo quruxda badan" ay jiraan marka la fiiriyo mustaqbalka.
"Anigu aad ayaan u hubaa, maxaa yeelay kooxdan iyo ciyaartoydani waxay na siiyeen sabab kasta oo aan rumaysanno in natiijadu ay runtii fiicnaan doonto," ayuu yidhi.

"Guul la'aan iyo timahii oo kusii bixi doona" Man United ma waxaa ku habsatay cuqubo?
Xigashada Sawirka, The United Strand
Waxa ay ahayd fikrad si fudud ku bilaabatay oo u uku baahiyey la wadaagay baraha bulshada, 493 maalmood gudahood waxa ay noqotaywax aad uga weyn sidii uu filayay fikraddii uu curinteeda lahaa.
Frank Ilett, oo sidoo kale loo yaqaan The United Strand, ayaa soo dhigay muuqaal 5-tii Oktoobar 2024, halkaas oo uu sheegay in aanay timaha madaxa xiiri doonin, illaa kooxda uu taageero ee Manchester United ay guuleysato shan ciyaarood oo xidhiidh ah.
Muqaalka dhexdiisa waxa uu lahaa codbixin uu waydiiyay dadkii koobnaa ee xilligaas ku xidhnaa bartiisa baraha bulshada, markaas oo ay filayeen in timihiisa uu jari doono mar kale: 2024, 2025 ama 2026? 27,000 jawaabood oo la helay, 90% waxay yiraahdeen 2026. Ka dib markii ay barbar dhac 1-1 ah ka heleen West Ham Talaadadii caawa, sugitaanka ayaa ah mid weli sii socdaa.
Ilett hadda waxa uu leeyahay in ka badan 2.3 milyan oo raacsan baraha bulshada waxana uu baahinayey muuqaal toos ah oo YouTube ah ciyaartan Talaadadii, taas oo mararka qaar ay daawanayeen in ka badan 100,000 qof.
Isaga oo ka hadlaya 365 maalmood ka dib markii uu bilaabay hawshan, Ilett ayaa u sheegay BBC Sport in fikradda 'guul la'aan, timaha ma jari doono' markii hore ujeedku ahaa madadaalo aan waxyeello lahayn, looguna talagalay in la wadaago "dareen wanaagsan" xilligaas oo ay taageerayaasha United ku jireen niyad jab.
"Waxaan kaliya doonayaa inaan farxad u keeno taageerayaasha kale ee Manchester United xilligan yaabka leh ee kooxda haysta," ayuu yidhi.
Sida uu sheegay Ilett, ma jirin qorshe weyn – kaliya xamaasad iyo kooxdiisii kubbadda cagta oo xaalad liidata ku jirta ayaa ku kelliftay.
"Waxaan u malaynayay inay ku dhammaan doonto saddex ama afar bilood gudahood," ayuu u sheegay BBC Sport. "Waxay ahayd inay noqoto wax iska qosol ah oo madadaalo ah ' Laakiin sidaas may noqon."
Markii ugu dambaysay ee United ay guuleysatay shan ciyaarood oo xiriir ah waxay ahayd intii u dhaxaysay Janaayo iyo Febraayo 2024.
Ilett ayaa sheegay in aanay "taasi markii hore aysan u muuqan waqti dheer markii caqabadda koxoda haysataa bilaabatay", laakiin taariikhdu waxay bixisaa casharro badan.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Waqtigii ugu dheeraa ee kooxdu aanay shan guulood oo xidhiidh ah helin waxay ahayd 902 maalmood, taas oo dhammaatay Janaayo 1999 – tirakoob uu Ilett sheegay inuusan rabin inuu ku sii fariisto.
"Waxaan ku bilaabay tan anigoo u malaynaya inay ahayd hoos u dhac xagga qaab ciyaareedka ah, gaar ahaan maadaama United ay ku guuleysatay FA Cup bishii Maajo. Ma aanan ogeyn inay sii xumaan karto oo ay sii socon karto muddo dheer," ayuu yidhi.
Iyadoo bilaha ay sii socdeen, caqabaddiina way is beddeshay. Waxa uu ku bilaabmay muuqaal fudud oo qosol leh wuxuu noqday calaamad muuqata oo ku saabsan dhibaatooyinka United, iyadoo timihiisa Ilett ay noqdeen xusuus toddobaadle ah oo lagu wadaago baraha bulshada.
"Timahaygu waa matalaad muuqaal ah oo muujinaysa in Man Utd aanay joogin meesha ay joogi jirtay, sidaa darteed waan fahmay sababta kooxdu aysan ila soo xidhiidhin, laakiin waxaan rajaynayaa markay sii socoto oo aan helno dareen wanaagsan in dadka kooxda ka ag dhaw, inay ila soo xidhiidhi doonaan," ayuu yidhi Ilett.
Markii ay sii kordhay dareenka, waxaa yimid lacag sameyn muuqaalladiisii ah, sii baahinta muqaallo faro badan, iyo mas'uuliyad uusan filayn.
"Maahan aniga wax igu kooban," ayuu yidhi. "Dad badan ayaa la socda. Ma joojin karo."
Ilett hadda waxa uu leeyahay wakiil ka shaqeeya dalabyada ganacsi wuxuuna la shaqeeyay shirkado waaweyn oo warbaahineed isaga oo ka faa'iidaysanaya timihiisa sii baxaya. Waxa kale oo uu leeyahay shirkad si fiican u dhisan oo maareysa codsiyada warbaahinta.
Markii la waydiiyay meesha uu rabo in timihiisa lagy jaro, Ilett ayaa u sheegay BBC Sport inay jirto hal meel oo keliya oo uu maskaxda ku hayo.
"Haddii ay ii ogolaadaan, waxay noqon lahayd wax cajiib ah inaan garoonka Old Trafford lagu jaro oo ay mid ka mid ah ciyaartoyda i jarayo ama wax la mid ah, laakiin waa inaan sugnaa waqtiga ku dhow," ayuu yidhi.

Sidee ayaad xogtaad ugu aammin kartaa taleefanka cusub ee Samsung S26?
Samsung ayaa soo saartay taleefankeeda casriga ah ee cusub ee Galaxy S26, kaas oo qiimihiisu wax yar ka sarreeyo kii hore.
Mid ka mid ah waxyaabaha gaarka ah ee taleefankan ayaa ah in markii ugu horreysay lagu daray astaanta "ilaalinta macluumaadk shakhsiga ah". Tani waxay kuu oggolaanaysaa in aad hubiso in qof kale aanu arki karin shaashaddaada.
Taleefankan cusub ee shirkadda Samsung S26 ayaa bilaaban doona in la iibiyo laga bilaabo 11-ka March.
Korodh miyaa ku iman doona qiimaha iPhone-ka? Arrintan, madaxa Apple Tim Cook ayaa bishii Janaayo sheegay in uu filayo in qiimaha chips-ka uu kordho, hase yeeshee ma uusan sheegin in Apple ay qorsheyneyso inay ka jawaabto taas in ay kor u qaadayso qiimaha taleefanka iPhone-ka.
Sannadkii la soo dhaafay, dalabka iPhone-ka ayaa kordhay Shiinaha iyo Hindiya, taasoo keentay in Samsung ay la kulanto khasaare.
Astaanta taleefanka ee ay xiiseynayaan isticmaaleyaasha baraha bulshada waxaa lagu magacaabaa "Ilaalinta xogta shakhsiga ah."
Sida ay sheegtay shirkadda Samsung, "xogta shakhsiga ah" waa hirumar cusub oo si weyn u beddela habka ilaalinta xogta isticmaalaha.
Xaaladaha maalinlaha ah sida safarka, maqaayadaha, ama xafiiska marka aad taleefanka isticmaalayso, waxaad u baahan tahay in aad xaqiijiso in xogtaada gaarka ah ay sir kuu ahaato.
Samsung waxay sheegtay in iyada oo la xakameynayo faafidda iftiinka heer pixel, shaashaddani ay ka dhigto waxyaabaha ku jira isticmaalka maalinlaha ah kuwo cad, dhalaalaya oo aan dhibayn qofka isticmaalaya, islamarkaana ay yareyso fursadaha in qof kale uu arko.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Dhanka kale, Google ayaa sheegtay in S26 uu yahay taleefanka casriga ah ee ay ka heli doonaan aaladaha ugu horumarsan ee garaadka macmalka ah. Tusaale ahaan, waxaad Gemini weydiisan kartaa in uu kugu hago gurigaaga, wax ka soo iibsato dukaanka, ama cunto aad jeceshahay dalbato. Waxaad sidoo kale si toos ah ula socon kartaa hawsha aad u dirsato Gemini.
Waxaad sawir kasta ku qori kartaa si aad ugu baarto Google, sida noocyada dharka moodalka aad xiisaynayso.
Sida uu sheegay Google, taleefankan waxaa ku jira astaanta AI oo kuu sheegi karta haddii wicitaanka soo galaya uu yahay khiyaamo ama "scam."
Sidoo kale, taleefankan waxaa ku jira astaanta "caawunaysa marka aad sawir qaadayso" oo u oggolaanaysa isticmaaleyaasha inay AI weydiistaan in uu wax ka beddelo sawirkooda, sida beddelida dhammaystiran, midabka dharka, iyo wixii la mid ah.
Samsung Galaxy S26 ayaa markii hore lagu soo bandhigay Kuuriyada Koonfureed iyo Mareykanka.
Taleefankan waxaa ku jira astaamo dheeraad ah oo ka mid ah kaaliyayaasha AI ee Google Gemini iyo kaaliyaha AI ee Samsung Bixby.
Samsung ayaa qaar ka mid ah moodooyinka S26 ku dartay nidaamkeeda Exynos ee ay iyagu sameeyaan halkii ay ka isticmaali lahaayeen Qualcomm, taasoo khubaradu sheegayaan inay kordhin karto faa'iidada shirkadda.
Mareykanka, qiimaha Galaxy S26 wuxuu ka bilaabmaa $899, taasoo 4.7% ka badan moodalkii hore. Qiimaha S26 Plus waa $1099, taasoo 10% ka badan moodalkii hore, halka qiimaha S26 Ultra aanu wax isbeddel ah ku imaan.
Kuuriyada Koonfureed, qiimaha moodalka aasaasiga ah ayaa kordhay 8.6%.

Dhegeyso: Rabshadihii maanta ka dhacay gudaha baarlamaanka Federaalka
Rabshado kale ayaa saaka hareeyay kulan ay lahaayeen xildhibaanada labada aqal ee Barlamaanka Soomaaliya, kaasi oo ajandaha looga hadli lahaa uu ahaa in laga doodo soo jeedimaha wax ka badalka dastuurka cutubka afaraad, gaar ahaa soo jeedimaha wax ka badal kooban ee qodobada 94-aad, 50-aad iyo 54-aad.
Xildhibaan ka tirsan barlamaanka Federaalka ayaa sheegtay in la dhawaacay kadib markii uu 'askari ka tirsan ciidamada booliska u gacan qaaday', waa sida ay hadalka u dhigtaye.
Weriyaha BBC-da ee Muqdisho Ibraahim Maxamed Aadan ayaa weydiiyay xildhibaan Cadar Xareed sida ay maanta Barlamaanka wax uga dhaceen, ka dibna warbixintan ayuu ka diyaariyey.

Waa maxay waxa ay Iimaaraadka, Turkiga iyo Sacuudiga oo aan isku dan ahayn ka doonayaan Itoobiya
Imaaraatka Carabta (UAE) iyo Sacuudiga weligood ma ahayn kuwo iska soo horjeeda.
Tusaale ahaan, waxay si wada jir ah uga shaqeeyeen sidii ay u caawin lahaayeen madaxweynaha Masar Abdel Fattah al-Sisi inuu xukunka qabto.
Inkasta oo ay maanta isku soo jeesteen, haddana waxa ay hore mawqifyo isku mid ah uga qaateen Liibiya iyo Yemen.
Wadamada Jaamacadda Carabta ayaa sidoo kale mowqif isku mid ah ka leh arrimaha Israa'iil iyo Falastiin.
Sababo badan ayaa jira khilaafkooda, balse warbixintaan waxaan ku soo qaadanaynaa sababaha ugu waaweyn ee khilaafkooda.
Magaca Itoobiya ayaa lagu soo qaadayey Imaaraadka iyo Sacuudiga in muddo ah. Mustaqbalku waa ganacsi iyo maalgashi, laakiin ma jiraa ajande siyaasadeed oo ka dambeeya? Maxay yihiin arrimaha tilmaamaya jiritaanka qorshe siyaasadeed?
Turkiga ayaa isna dhanka kale u socda. Si ka duwan labada dal ee Khaliijka [Sacuudi Carabiya iyo Imaaraadka], Itoobiya iyo Turkiga waxaa ka dhexeeya xiriir soo jireen ah.
Laakiin qaab noocee ah ayuu hadda xiriirkoodu yahay? Mukarram Mifta (PhD) oo ah cilmi-baare dhanka siyaasadda ah oo ka tirsan jaamacadda shaqaalaha dawladda Itoobiya ayaa is barbar dhigay danaha Imaaraadka iyo Sucuudiga iyo danaha Maraykanka iyo Israa'iil.
Ibrahim Mulushawa (PhD) oo ah aasaasaha iyo madaxa xarunta daraasaadka is-dhexgalka heer qaran iyo heer gobol ayaa sheegay in Turkiga uu hadda majaraha u hayo Erdogan uu ahmiyad gaar ah siinayo Afrika.
Saddexda waddan maxay ka rabaan Itoobiya? Si aan tan u fahanno, aan dib u yara noqonno.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Dowladaha Imaaraatka Carabta iyo Sacuudiga ayaa muddooyinkii dambe kordhiyay saameynta ay ku leeyihiin dalalka Itoobiya iyo Koonfur Afrika.
Halkee buu ka dhashay xifaaltanka ka dhexeeya dalalkan? Labada dal waa dalal Muslim ah oo Carab ah.
Laakin waxay u loollamayaan inay ka sare maraan dalalka Carabta ee Muslimka ah.
Dr. A.S. Mukarram ayaa sheegay in mucaaradku ay sii xoogeysteen, gaar ahaan tan iyo markii uu xukunka la wareegay wiilka boqor Maxamed Bin Salmaan.
Sacuudi Carabiya waxay isu aragtaa inay matasho dalalka Muslimka ah, sababtoo ah waxay hoy u tahay meelaha ugu qadarinta badan Islaamka, Maka iyo Madiina.
Imaaraadku ma lahayn taariikh ballaaran oo diineed iyo mid taariikheed oo uu ku tartamo arrintan, sidaas darteed waxay xoojiyeen tartankooda dhaqaale.
Imaaraadku waxa uu ku tartamayaa tartan adag oo dhanka sayniska iyo tignoolajiyada ah iyo sidoo kale qaybta dhismaha.
Qaar badan oo ka mid ah ganacsatada Yurub, Mareykanka, Shiinaha iyo Hindida ayaa maalgashaday Imaaraadka Carabta, iyaga oo ka caawiyay dalka inuu si degdeg ah u koro.
Dr. A.S. Mukarram waxa uu sheegay in Sucuudigu aanu guusha dhaqaale la wadaagi karin sida Imaaraadka oo kale.
Marka ay sii korodho su'aasha ah sarraynta diinta, arrimaha siyaasadda iyo dhaqaalaha ayaa si lama filaan ah u raacaya.
Imaaraadku waayadan dambe waxa uu dhisayay dhaqaale ku salaysan adeegyo xooggan.
Dubai, oo ay ka jiraan dhaqdhaqaaqyo ganacsi oo badan, ayaa tusaale fiican u ah arrintan.
Dhinaca kale, Sacuudiga waxa uu leeyahay kheyraad shidaal oo aad u badan.
Khubaradu waxa ay sheegeen in taasi ay xoojinayso awoodeeda iyada oo hubka casriga ah ka soo iibsanaysa Maraykanka iyo Yurub oo leh khayraadkeeda shidaalka. Arrintan marka la eego Imaaraadku aad uma xoog badna.
"Dareenka tartanka ugu dambeyntii wuxuu u wareegay xafiiltan," ayuu yiri. Mukarram. Waxa uu sheegay in loolanka Imaaraadka iyo Sacuudiga uu ka soo bilowdo danaha gaarka ah ee madaxdooda.
Wiilka uu dhalay boqorka Sucuudiga ah ee Mohammed bin Salman (MBS) iyo madaxweynaha Imaaraadka Carabta Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan ayaa doonaya in caalamka looga aqoonsado hoggaamiyeyaal keenay "isbeddelo aasaasi ah".
Labada dal waxaa maamula qoysas boqortooyo. Dr Mukarram ayaa sheegay in labada hogaamiye ay rabeen in ay tusaale u noqdaan wadamada carabta si ay isbedel u sameeyaan.
Tusaale ahaan, MBS oo u oggolaaday haweenka inay kaxeeyaan oo martiqaadaan fannaaniinta reer galbeedka waxay muujinaysaa in waddanku uu keenayo isbeddel asaasi ah.
Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed Aala Nahyan ma doonayo inuu lumiyo tartanka.
Loolanka shaqsiyadeed ee sii xoogeysanaya ee u dhaxeeya labada hogaamiye ayaa sidoo kale ku lug leh arimo ka imaanaya wadamada kale ee caalamka.
"Khilaafka u dhexeeya labada hoggaamiye ee wacadka ku maray inay dib u habeyn sameynayaan ayaa ku sii fidaya heer hay'ad iyo heer qaran, hadda labada mas'uul way is quursadaan, waxay u guureen min khilaaf shaqsiyeed ilaa heer urur" ayuu yiri Dr Mukarram.
Bal aan aragno sida loollanka shaqsi ilaa hay'adaha iyo waddammada ku faafay ay ugu lug lahaayeen Itoobiya iyo Koonfur Afrika.
Doorka dalalka Carabta ee Geeska Afrika iyo Itoobiya ayaa soo shaac baxay intii ay jirtay xukuumadda Ra'iisul Wasaare Abiy Axmed.
Imaaraatka Carabta iyo Sacuudi Carabiya waxay Itoobiya ka wadaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo maalgashi oo balaayiin doolar gaaraya.
Tan iyo markii uu xukunka qabtay RW Abiy, Imaaraadku wuxuu Itoobiya siyaabo kala duwan ugu bixiyay 3 bilyan oo doolar.
Dr. A.S. Mukarram wuxuu halkan ku eegayaa xiriirka Itoobiya iyo Imaaraadka ka hor iyo ka dib 2018.
Khubaradu waxa ay sheegeen in xiriirka siyaasadeed iyo dhaqaale uu xilli hore billowdo oo uu balaarto, balse xiriirka Itoobiya iyo Imaaraatku aanu ahayn mid si degdeg ah u horumaray ee yahay mid si tartiib tartiib ah u kordhaya.
Haddii aan soo qaadano Turkiga, horumarka xiriirka ama isbeddelada dhaqaale iyo siyaasadeed ee labada waddan waa mid "la saadaalin karo," ayuu yiri.
Mar haddii soo sheegnay arrinta Turkiga, aan ku eegno xiriirka uu la leeyahay Itoobiya qaab ka duwan kan dalalka Khaliijka.
Xiriirka Turkiga iyo Itoobiya wuxuu soo bilowday dhaqdhaqaaqii Boqortooyadii Turkiga ee Cusmaaniyiinta ee qarnigii 16aad.
Turkidu waxay ku wareegsanaayeen badda cas muddo sanado ah. Tani waxay muujineysaa sida uu u xooggan yahay xiriirka taariikhiga ah ee labada dal.
Xiriirkaas oo wiiqmay xilligii hantiwadaaga-Dargiga, waxa uu soo noqday xilligii ADWUI.
Dr. A.S. Ibraahim ayaa sheegay in tan iyo markii xisbiga AK uu talada dalka Turkiga qabtay ay sare u kaceen maal-gashiyo lagu sameynayo dalal kala duwan, si loo dardargeliyo horumarka dalka.
Waddamada uu Turkigu u doortay maalgashiga waxa ka mid ah Itoobiya. Maalgashiga wadanku ku sameeyay Itoobiya waxa uu gaadhay ilaa 2.5 bilyan oo doolar.
In ka badan 20,000 oo Itoobiyaan ah ayaa ka shaqeeya in ka badan 200 oo shirkadood.
Xiriirka labada dal, si kastaba ha ahaatee, waxa uu ka gudbay maalgashiga iyo ganacsiga isaga oo u gudbay isku-dubarid ciidan.
Turkidu waxay isu haystaan inay qayb ka yihiin Yurub
"Tani waxay sahlaysa Itoobiya iyo Turkiga inay yeeshaan xiriir ku salaysan sinnaan," ayuu yiri. Ibraahim.
Aan u gudubno danaha iyo qorshaha Turkiga iyo sidoo kale Imaaraadka iyo Sacuudiga ee Itoobiya iyo Geeska Afrika.
Marka la eego danaha Imaaraadka iyo Sacuudiga, hal falanqeyn ayaa ah in dalalka Afrika oo ay gilgishay xasillooni darro ay ka baqayaan qalalaase siyaasadeed iyo dhaqaale burbur si ay u ilaashadaan danahooda dhaqaale.
Waxaa hubaal ah in wadamadani ay rabaan in ay balaariyaan saldhigyada milatari ee ay ku leeyihiin Afrikada bari.
Waxa kale oo run ah in goobtani tahay goob ganacsi oo aad u mashquul badan.
Dalalkan ayaa doonaya in ay ilaalo xooggan u sameeyaan dhaqdhaqaaqyadooda maalgashi ee Bariga Afrika.
Marka laga yimaado ciidamada Tigrayga iyo colaada u dhaxaysa Axmaarada iyo Axmaarada, haddana waxaa dhibaato ku ah ammaanka Itoobiya.
Dr. A.S. Ibraahim wuxuu diiradda saaray ilaalinta danaha Mareykanka iyo Israa'iil.
Xiriirka Mareykanka iyo Afrika ayaa wiiqmay tan iyo markii madaxweyne Trump la doortay mar labaad.
Sidaa darteed, waxaa la isku dayay in la daboolo baahiyaha Mareykanka iyadoo loo dirayo dalal kale.
Danaha Maraykanka iyo Israa'iil ee geeska Afrika ayaa ku xiran siyaasadda arrimaha dibadda ee Israa'iil "inay ka jawaabto dalabka Israa'iil ee aqoonsiga qaran," ayuu yiri. Mukarram.
Wadamada Jaamacadda Carabta oo ay ku jirto Masar ayaa ah kuwa hormuudka ka ah saameynta ay ku leeyihiin arrimaha Israa'iil iyo Falastiin.
"Dhaqdhaqaaq kasta oo ka socda geeska Afrika waxaa lagu dari karaa saameyntan. Taasi waa sababta Maraykanka iyo Israa'iil ay u taageeraan UAE," ayuu yiri.
Xiisada u dhaxeysa Itoobiya iyo Eritrea ayaa cirka isku sii shareertay kadib sheegashada badda ee Itoobiya.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, Ra'iisul Wasaare Abiy Axmed, ayaa khudbad uu ka jeediyay Baarlamaanka ku sheegay in colaadda labada dal ay soo bilaabatay xilligii dagaalka Tigray.
Wuxuu sheegay in ciidamada Eritrea ay geysteen xadgudubyo ka dhan ah xuquuqul insaanka iyo burbur hantiyeed inta uu socday dagaalka, isagoo intaa ku daray in ciidamada Itoobiya ay ka hortageen arrintaasi, colaadana ay halkaasi ka bilaabatay.
Waxaa jira warar sheegaya in Imaaraatka Carabta iyo Sacuudiga ay wadaan "dagaal dadban" iyagoo kaashanaya dhinacyada isku haya Suudaan, ciidamada qalabka sida ee dalkaas iyo ciidamada gaarka ah ee RSF-ta.
Dhacdooyinkii ugu dambeeyay ee sii xumeeyay dhibaatada ka taagan dalka geeska Afrika waxaa ka mid ah heshiiskii isfaham ee la sheegay in Itoobiya iyo Somaliland ay kala saxiixdeen.
Soomaaliya oo ka xumaatay aqoonsiga Israa'iil ee Somaliland, ayaa wali sii wada inay ka ashtakooto. Taasina waxay keentay inay xiriirka u jarto Imaaraadka.
Masar oo aad uga xun biyo xireenka weyn ee Itoobiya ayaa labada dal waxay isku dayayaan in ay danahooda ka gaaraan Suudaan iyo Soomaaliya.
Xaaladda gobolka geeska Afrika waxaa go'aamiya danaha dalal shisheeye marka laga reebo danaha dalalka gobolka.
Madaxweynaha Eritrea ayaa ku eedeeyay Imaaraadka inay ka dambeeyaan dalabaadka badda ee Itoobiya ee dhowaan la adkeeyay. Waxay sidoo kale xoojiyeen xiriirka Sacuudiga.
Dr. A.S. Mukarram waxa uu aaminsan yahay in Itoobiya iyo Eritera ay ku dagaalami doonaan arrinta xadka badda.
"Marka la barbardhigo Sacuudiga, faragelinta Imaaraadka ee Itoobiya waa mid aad u weyn, waxay heystaan maalgashi dhan $2.5 bilyan, way garab istaagi karaan Itoobiya si ay arrintaas u ilaaliyaan" ayuu yiri.
Marka la eego burburka iyo go'doominta dublamaasiyadeed ee uu dagaalkaasi keenay, waxa uu khabiirku aaminsan yahay in Itoobiya ay si nabad ah ku xalin karto sheegashadeeda badda iyada oo adeegsanaysa Somaliland.
Laakiin haddii Itoobiya ay aqoonsi qaran siiso Somaliland, waxa lama huraan ah inay isku dhacaan Soomaaliya iyo Turkiga.
Muhiimadda gaarka ah ee Turkiga u hayo Afrika ayaa waxaa xoojiyey xiriirka uu la leeyahay Itoobiya, ayuu yiri. Ibraahim oo dhankiisa sheegay in siyaasadda Turkiga ee geeska Afrika ay awood u siin doonto "in ay si siman uga faa'iideystaan dhammaan.
Turkiga ayaa xiriir wanaagsan la leh Itoobiya iyo Soomaaliya, waxaana uu doonayaa in labada dal uu nabad ka dhex dhaliyo.
Fariinta uu Turkigu rabo in uu gudbiyo ayaa ah "waa in aynaan si sahal ah ku waayin Itoobiya".

Sidee Afrika uga fal-celisay dilkii Ayatollah Khamenei?
Dilkii hogaamiyaha ugu sarreeya ee Iiraan, Ayatollah Khamenei, ee ku dhintay weerar wadajir ah oo ay fuliyeen Maraykanka iyo Israel, ayaa saameyn weyn ku yeeshay meelo badan oo Afrika ah.
Dowladaha, kooxaha diimeed, iyo hogaamiyeyaasha bulshada ayaa uga jawaabay siyaabo kala duwan, taasoo muujineysa xiriirada siyaasadeed iyo diimeed ee muddo dheer soo jiray ee u dhexeeya Afrika iyo Iiraan.
Mudo tobanaan sano ah, Iiraan waxay maalgelisay xarumo diimeed, deeqo waxbarasho, iyo hay'ado dhaqameed dalal sida Nigeria, Niger, Ghana, iyo Gambia.
Sidaa darteed, dhacdooyinka ka dhaca Tehran badanaa waxay saameyn ka yeeshaan meel ka baxsan Bariga Dhexe.
"Nigeria, oo ah dalka ay ku nool yihiin muslimiinta Shiicada ugu badan Afrika, ayaa waxaa ka dhacay mudaharaadyo ku dhawaad 12 gobol oo waqooyi ah si loogu tacsiyo geeridii Khamenei."
Dowladdu waxay xoojisay ammaanka, iyadoo digniin u dirtay qof kasta oo isku dayaya inuu kiciyo rabshado ama xiisado diimeed.
Ibrahim Musa, oo ah Shiico caan ka ah isla markaana tifaftire u ah Almizan, wargeys diimeed Nigeria ka soo baxa , ayaa sheegay in dadka iimaanka leh ay Khamenei u arkaan "ilaha hagidda diimeed, anshaxeed iyo ruuxeed," isla markaana si weyn loogu ixtiraamo xirfadiisa.
Professor Isah Mshelgaru, oo ah u dhaqdhaqaaqa Shiicada Nigeria, ayaa sheegay in geeridiisu "aad u murugo badan tahay," isagoo intaa ku daray: "Si weyn ayaa loo xiisi doonaa. Marka la eego sida uu u geeriyooday, aad ayaan uga faaneynaa. Waa sharaf weyn."
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Ibrahim Zakzaky, oo aasaasay Dhaqdhaqaaqa Islaamiga ee Nigeria (IMN) kadib kacaankii Iiraan ee 1979, ayaa xiriir dhow la leh Iiraan wuxuuna door weyn ka ciyaaray soo ifbaxidda Islaamiyiinta Shiicada ee Nigeria.
Dhaqdhaqaaqani wuxuu horumariyaa Islaamka Shiicada wuxuuna ilaaliyaa xiriir diimeed iyo mid fikradeed oo uu la leeyahay Iiraan.
Omer Carmi, oo ahaa sarkaal milatari iyo arday ka diyaaruinaya shahaadad PHD oo ka tirsan Jaamacadda Tel Aviv University, ayaa maqaal ku sheegay in hogaamiyaha ugu sarreeya ee Iiraan uu meel fagaaro ah ka xusay Zakzaky iyo IMN, taasoo muujineysa in dhaqdhaqaaqani uu yahay qayb ka mid ah shabakad ballaaran oo Iiraan ah isla markaana door muhiim ah ka ciyaara Galbeedka Afrika.
Dalka deriska ah ee Niger, mudaharaadyo ayaa ka dhacay caasimadda, Niamey. Mudaharaadayaasha ayaa cambaareeyay dilka Cali Khamenei isla markaana muujiyay midnimo ay la wadaagaan Iiraan.
Dalka Gambia, halkaasoo Islaamka Shiicadu sidoo kale kor ugu sii kacayo, Professor Sufi Atif Amin Al Hussaini ayaa Khamenei ku tilmaamay "hogaamiyaha sharci ee ummadda Islaamka."
Wuxuu weerarka ku tilmaamay "fashil akhlaaqeed iyo sharci" wuxuuna sheegay in Maraykanka iyo Israel "laga adkaaday dagaalka diblomaasiyadeed iyo kan akhlaaqeed."
Xigashada Sawirka, AFP via Getty Images
Burkina Faso ayaa qaaday mid ka mid ah go'aannada ugu adag gobolka. Dowladda ayaa cambaareysay weerarka waxayna ku dhawaaqday in safaaradda Maraykanka ee Ouagadougou la xiro. Sidoo kale waxay dib ugu soo celisay safiirkeeda Mareykanka.
Go'aankani wuxuu calaamadeynayaa isbeddel weyn oo ku yimid siyaasadda dibadda ee dalka. Sida Mali iyo Niger, Burkina Faso sannadihii u dambeeyay waxay hoos u dhigtay xiriirka ay la leedahay wadamada Galbeedka iyadoo raadinaysa la-hawlgalayaal kale.
Dilka Ali Khamenei ayaa xoojiyay hadallo xooggan oo ku saabsan madax-bannaanida iyo ka soo horjeedka faragelinta shisheeye.
Senegal waa mid ka mid ah wadamada ugu horeeya Afrika ee si toos ah uga hadla arrintan. Ra'iisul Wasaaraha Ousmane Sonko ayaa dilalka ku tilmaamay "kuwa aad u daran" isla markaana "murugo leh."
"Laba maalmood, dagaal ayaa ka qarxay Bariga Dhexe, oo ay kiciyay Mareykanka iyo xulafadiisa Israel, kuwaas oo doortay inay weeraraan Iiraan... Waa arrin murugo leh... weerarka dalalka kale, cadaadiska dalalka si markii dambe loo qabsado; dal aan raacin go'aan ama amar ka yimid Qaramada Midoobay wuxuu go'aan ka gaari karaa inuu weeraro dalal kale... inuu dilo madax, waa arrin aad u daran."
Senegal ayaa si dhaqameed ula leh xiriiro dhow oo ay la leedahay wadamada Galbeedka iyo dunida Islaamka.
Xigashada Sawirka, AFP via Getty Images
Marka laga soo tago dalalka Saaxil, Madaxweynaha Koonfur afrika, Cyril Ramaphosa, ayaa cambaareeyay weerarrada Maraykanka iyo Israel ee Iiraan, isagoo adkeeyay inay ka hor imaanayaan sharciga caalamiga ah.
"Weerarka ugu horreeya oo lagu magacaabo is-difaac ma oggola sharciga caalamiga ah, is-difaacana ma ku salaysna karo mala-awaal ama filasho," ayuu yiri, isagoo ku baaqay "in weerarradu istaagaan."
Koonfur Afrika waa xubin ka tirsan kooxda BRICS, taasoo Iiraan ku jirto.
Sida Ramaphosa, Madaxweynaha Kenya, William Ruto ayaa sidoo kale muujiyay mowqifkiisa ku saabsan weerarradan, isagoo yiri: "Kenya si xooggan ayay u cambaareysaa weerarrada ka dhan ah Isutagga Imaaraatka Carabta, Qatar, Sacuudi Carabiya, Ciraaq, Cuman, Kuwait, Urdun iyo Baxrayn, iyadoo la tixgelinayo xiisadda sii socota ee Bariga Dhexe."
Wuxuu digniin u diray in haddii khilaafku ku faafo dalal kale oo gobolka ah, uu khatar ku noqon karo nabadda iyo xasilloonida adduunka.
Dhinaca Afrika, waxaa jiray bayaanno cambaareyn iyo baaqyo ku saabsan joojinta dagaalka, oo ay ku jiraan mudaharaadyo waddooyinka ka dhacay.
Iyadoo Iiraan ay fulinayso weerarro aargoosi ah iyo awoodaha caalamiga ah ay ka digayaan dagaal sii kordhaya, dowladaha Afrika ayaa si dhow u la soconaya xaaladda.
Dadka badan ee ku nool gobolka Saaxil, xiisadda hadda jirta ma aha oo kaliya khilaaf meel fog ka dhacaya, balse waxay taabanaysaa mucaaradka, aqoonsiga diimeed, qiyamka, iyo nolosha Ali Khamenei.

Sidee ayay rabshadaha Mexico u saamayn karaan Koobka Adduunka?
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Martigelinta wadajirka ah ee Mexico ee Koobka Adduunka ee Fifa xagaagan ayaa laga yaabaa in ay halis gasho sababo la xiriira rabshadaha maandooriyaha ee bilowday Axaddii, sida ay khubaradu u sheegeen BBC Sport.
Kooxda maandooriyaha ka ganacsata ee la yidhaahdo Jalisco New Generation (CJNG) oo ka mid ah ururrada dambiyada ee ugu awoodda badan looguna cabsada badan yahay dalkaas ayaa ku lug yeelatay iska-horimaadyo hubeysan oo ay la gashay milatariga Mexico, waxayna xireen waddooyin isla markaana waxa ay gubeen gaadiid, iyaga oo ka jawaabaya dilka hoggaamiyahooda Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, oo loo yaqaannay "El Mencho", intii lagu jiray hawlgal uu fuliyay ciidanka.
Ugu yaraan 25 askari oo ka tirsan Ilaalada Qaranka ayaa lagu dilay muddo 24 saacadood gudahood ah.
Guadalajara, oo ah caasimadda gobolka Jalisco islamarkaana hoy u ah in ka badan hal milyan oo qof, ayaa loo qorsheeyay inay martigeliso afar kulan oo tartanka xagaagan ah. Shan kale ayaa lagu qaban doonaa Magaalada Mexico, afar kalena Monterrey.
"Guud ahaan, kooxaha maandooriyahu waxay dan dhaqaale ayay ka leeyihiin in Koobka Adduunku uu u dhaco si nabad ah," ayuu yidhi Dr Eskauriatza. Waxaana uu intaas ku daray
"Haa, waxay laaluushaan siyaasiyiinta iyo booliska maxalliga ah, balse sidoo kale waxay iibsadaan maqaayado oo huteello ayey leeyihiin. Waxay qayb ka yihiin nidaamka dhaqaale.
BBC Sport ayaa la xiriirtay Fifa si ay uga hesho jawaab.
Waxaa lagu qiyaasaa in CJNG ay leedahay hanti ka badan £10 bilyan, waxayna leedahay tobannaan kun oo xubno ka ah. Tan iyo markii la aasaasay 2009, waxay masuul ka ahayd taxane dhibaatooyin ah oo ay ka mid yihiin xasuuqyo, afduubyo iyo dilalka siyaasiyiinta.
Laakiin qaar ka mid ah hoggaamiyeyaasha kooxda maandooriyaha waxay weli caan ka yihiin bulshooyinka maxalliga ah ee Mexico, maadaama ay maalgelin u sameeyaan kaabayaasha iyo adeegyada deegaanka.
Dowladda Maraykanka ayaa dadka Maraykanka ee ku sugan Jalisco ku talisay inay gudaha guryahooda ku sugnaadaan ilaa ogeysiis dambe, halka dalka Canada, oo sidoo kale martigelinaysa Koobka Adduunkau ay joojisay duulimaadyada garoonka diyaaradaha ee Puerto Vallarta.
Qorshaha amniga ee Koobka Adduunka ayaa indhawaale ahaa mid si dhow isha loogu hayo sababtoo ah howlgallada saraakiisha ImmiLaanta socdaalka Maraykanka (ICE) ee loo diray magaalooyinka waaweyn ee Maraykanka oo ah howlgallo uu amray Madaxweyne Donald Trump, kuwaas oo ilaa hadda keenay in laba muwaadin oo Maraykan ah lagu dilay magaalooyinkaas.
Bishii hore, Taageerayaasha Kubadda Cagta ee Yurub ayaa sheegay inay "aad uga walaacsan yihiin sii socoshada hawlgalladaasi ee ciidamada booliiska ee Maraykanka."
Hadda indhuhu waxay ku jeedaan Mexico iyo su'aasha ah in ay augi karto ammaanka taageerayaasha safarka ah.
Afar kulan oo kubadda cagta ah oo ay laba yihiin horyaalka sare iyo laba heerka labaad ayaa dib loo dhigay Axaddii sababo la xiriira rabshadaha.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Sannadkii la soo dhaafay, Mexico waxaa saaranaa cadaadis siyaasadeed oo kordhay si tallaabo looga qaado kooxaha maandooriyaha.
"Jawaabtan ma aha mid gaar ah balse waa mid aad u culus oo baaxad weyn leh," ayuu yiri Jon Benjamin, safiirka Ingiriiska ee Mexico intii u dhaxaysay 2021 iyo 2024.
"Madaxweyne Trump ayaa kooxaha maandooriyaha u aqoonsaday ururro argagixiso, Mexico-na hore waxay u gudbisay tiro ka mid ah hogaamiyeyaasha kooxahaas. Arrinta Trump waxay muhiimad weyn ku leedahay waxa hadda dhacaya."

Muxuu yahay walaaca ay qabaan farsamayaqaannada tumi jiray agabka la isticmaalo
Farsamada gacanta lagu sameeyo waa xirfad soo jirtay muddo dheer, isla markaana soo martay marxalado kala duwan oo taariikhi ah.
Dadka ku shaqeeya xirfaddan ayaa sannado badan ku tiirsanaa aqoontooda iyo gacmahooda, iyaga oo soo saari jiray agab kala duwan oo baahi weyn u lahaa bulshada, kana mid ahaa wax-soo-saarka maxalliga ah ee lagu faani jiray.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, maanta farsamadan waxa ku soo wajahan walaac isa soo taraya, kaas oo la xiriira halista ay ugu jirto inay gebi ahaanba baaba'do.
Dadka ku shaqeysta ayaa sheegaya in hoos uu dhac weyn ku yimid shaqooyinkii ay horay u qaban jireen, taas oo si toos ah u saamaysay noloshooda iyo isku filnaanshahooda dhaqaale.
Daahir Jaamac Maxamed oo ka mid ah farsamayaqaannada muddada dheer ku jiray hawshan, ayaa sheegay in shaqooyinkii ay ku tiirsanaan jireen ay hadda aad u yaraadeen. Wuxuu tilmaamay in xaaladdan ay keentay in bulshada ay si sii kordhaysa ugu tiirsanaato alaabo dibadda laga keeno, halkii ay horay u isticmaali jireen wax-soo-saarka gudaha. Sida uu sheegay, arrintani ma aha oo kaliya mid dhaqaale, balse waa mid saamaynaysa jiritaanka xirfadda lafteeda.
"Dad awal waxaynu ahayn isku filan, kabteena annagaa tolan jirnay, kuuyadeena annagaa tuman jirnay, dubbaheena annagaa samaysan jirnay. Dalka isku filnaansho meel dhow baanu joognay. Haddana waxaad mooddaa inaynu dad hoos tagayno" ayuu yiri Daahir Jaamac Maxamed.
Dhankiisa, Saxardiid Maxamed Guuleed oo isna ka mid ah dadka ku shaqeeya farsamadan ayaa sheegay in xaaladdu ay gaartay heer ay ku qasbanaadeen inay joojiyaan shaqooyinkii ay asal ahaan qaban jireen. Wuxuu sheegay in dadku ay doorbidayaan alaabaha dibadda laga keeno, taas oo keentay in farsamayaqaannadii maxalliga ahaa ay wajahaan shaqo la'aan.
Waxa uu intaa ku daray in hawsha kaliya ee hadda u hartay ay tahay inay dib u farsameeyaan ama dayactiraan alaabo dibadda laga keenay oo ciladoobay, halkii ay ka soo saari lahaayeen wax cusub oo ay iyagu leeyihiin.
"Wixii aan samayn jirnay oo dhan waxa la keenaa iyagoo carbi wada ah oo bakhaarada yaalla, dadkiina carbigaas bay gadanayaan, annagana shaqo la'aan baa nagu dhacday. Wax aan qabanayno hadda ma jiraan, waxa ay ayagu soo gataan oo ka soo hallaaba ayaan u sii samaynaa. Wixii aan samayn jirnay cid gadanaysa ma jirto" ayuu yiri Saxardiid Maxamed.
Arrinta kale ee sii xumaynaysa xaaladda ayaa ah in shaqadan ay maanta sii hayaan inta badan odayaal waayeel ah, halka dhallinyaradii baran lahayd xirfaddan oo mustaqbal u noqon lahayd ay gabi ahaanba ka jeesteen. Sababta aysan dhallinyaradu uga shaqayn, sida ay farsamayaqaannadu sheegayaan, waa marka ay arkeen in aanay jirin faa'iido muuqata ama dakhli ku filan oo ka soo baxa hawshan.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
"Dhaqdhaqaaqii waan iska daynay anagaas baa hadda daba socona, dhallinyaradii baran lahayd, samayn lahayd, xirfadda lahayd oo howlkarka ahayd waa iska daayeen markay arkeen inaysan waxba ka faa'iidayn, waxaasna waxa noogu wacan dowladda iyo ganacsatada oo aan joojinayn" ayuu yiri Saxardiid Maxamed.
Cabdi Mowliid Saleebaan ayaa sheegay in haddii la heli lahaa taageero dhab ah, qalab casri ah iyo dhiirrigelin rasmi ah, ay suuragal noqon lahayd in wax-soo-saarka farsamadan la kordhiyo, lana abuuro shaqooyin cusub oo ay ka faa'iideystaan dhallinyarada. Wuxuu aaminsan yahay in xirfaddani ay weli leedahay awood ay kaga qayb qaadan karto horumarinta dhaqaalaha gudaha, haddii loo helo daryeel iyo qorshe lagu badbaadinayo.
"Haddii qalab ay heli lahaayeen dhallinyarada oo dhan baanka shaqayn lahaa", ayuu yiri Cabdi Mowliid Saleebaan.
Inkasta oo ragga ku shaqeeya farsamadan weli laga arki karo waddooyinka iyo suuqyada qaarkood, haddana waxa ay ka cabanayaan taageero la'aan dhinaca dowladda ah, iyo sidoo kale bulsho aan si buuxda u dhiirrigelin iibka iyo isticmaalka agabka ay soo saaraan. Taasi waxay sii xoojisay dareenka ah in farsamadan qadiimiga ah ay wajahayso mustaqbal mugdi ah.
Warbixintan awgeed, waxa aan isku daynay in aan arrintan wax ka waydiinno mas'uuliyiinta dowladda iyo ganacsatada ay quseyso, si aan u helno aragtidooda ku aaddan xaaladda farsamadan iyo qorshayaasha jira ee lagu taageerayo. Hase yeeshee, illaa iyo hadda, dhammaan dhinacyadii aan la xiriirnay way ka gaabsadeen inay ka hadlaan arrintan.
Dadka farsamadan ku shaqaysta ayaa lagu yaqaan inay sameeyaan agabka guryaha, kuwa ugaarsiga, kuwa loo isticmaalo beeraha, iyo farsamooyin kale oo dhamaantood ama intooda badan ay maanta beddeleen mishiinno iyo qalab dibadda laga keeno oo ku shaqeeya batari ama koronto.

Xiisadda Itoobiya iyo Eriteriya: Sidee ayay u saamayn kartaa Soomaaliya?
Asmara ayaa iyada oo ka falcelinaysa bandhig milatari oo toddobaadkii hore ay Addis Ababa qabatay iyo hadallo ay mas'uuliyiinta dalkaasi ka jeediyeen munaasabaddaas, waxay sheegtay in arrintaasi uu yahay "xadgudub cad oo ka dhan ah madaxbannaanida iyo midnimada dhuleed ee deriska iyo dalalka gobolka."
Wasiirka Warfaafinta, Yemane Gebremeskel, ayaa jawaab uu bixiyay ku sheegay in hadalkii Ra'iisul Wasaaraha Itoobiya uu ahaa "mid sun ah oo kicin ah."
Abiy Axmed ayaa 22-kii bishan khudbad uu jeediyay ku sheegay in dalkiisu awooddiisa millatari u kala wareejiyay "min tababar dhul ilaa tababar badeed," isla markaana uu ilaalin doono marin-badeedka gobolka oo ku teedsan Soomaaliya ilaa dekedda Casab ee Ereteriya.
Abiy, oo ka hadlayay xus gaar ah oo 65 sano ah oo ka dhacay magaalada Hawassa ee gobolka Sidama, ayaa sidoo kale tilmaamay in Itoobiya dhistay "ciidan gaar ah" oo burburin kara bartilmaameedyo iyada oo adeegsanaysa diyaarado aan duuliye lahayn (drones) nooca kamikaze.
Hadalladan is dhaafsiga ah ayaa imanaya xilli xiisad ka dhex aloosan tahay Itoobiya iyo Ereteriya sababo la xiriira dalabka soo noqnoqda ee Addis Ababa ee ku aaddan helitaanka marin-badeed madaxbannaan, iyo sidoo kale xiisad u dhaxaysa dowladda federaalka Itoobiya iyo TPLF.
"Ujeedkeenna waa dhisidda ciidan gaar ah oo ka hortaga dagaal isla markaana soo afjara dagaal… Itoobiya lama cabsi gelin karo mana la cabsi gelin doono," ayuu yiri Abiy.
"Diyaargarowgeennu guud ahaan wuxuu ku wajahan yahay xaqiijinta nabadda iyo barwaaqada Afrika, iyo in aan taageero iyo garab u noqonno dalalka gobolkeenna. Si taas loo fuliyo ayaanu tababarkii milatari uga wareejinnay dhulka una wareejinnay badda," ayuu raaciyay.
Wasiir Yemane oo qoraal ku baahiyay barta X, ayaa sheegay in "mas'uuliyadda sugidda amniga Badda Cas ay saaran tahay oo ay khusayso dalalka ku teedsan."
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Mas'uulka Ereteriyaanka ah ayaa sidoo kale isku dayay in hadalka Abiy la barbardhigo hadal uu laba sano ka hor jeediyay madaxweyniha gobolka Oromiya, Shimelis Abdisa, oo sheegay in "sannadka soo socda aan ku dabaaldegi doonno Ciidda Irreecha Badda Cas."
"In kasta oo xaaladda caalamku tahay mid adag oo aan degganayn, islamarkaana cadaadisyadu sii kordhayaan, xisbiga Barwaaqo wuxuu aamminsan yahay in uu si buuxda u jebin karo shuruucda caalamiga ah," ayuu yiri.
Warbixinnada ayaa sheegaya in sannadihii u dambeeyay iyadoo xiriirkii dhowaa ee ka dhaxeeyay Addis Ababa iyo Asmara uu daciifay islamarkaana isu beddelay kala fogaansho, ay labada dhinac ku mashquulsan yihiin tababarro millatari oo ballaaran iyo xoojinta hubka.
Waxaa sidoo kale la sheegay in dhaqdhaqaaqyada ay labada dal la sameynayaan kooxaha mucaaradka ah ee midba midka kale ay sii hurinayaan xiisadda.
Mas'uuliyiin Itoobiyaan ah ayaa ku eedeeyay dowladda Ereteriya inay xiriir la sameyneyso TPLF, oo khilaaf kala dhaxeeyo dowladda federaalka, isla markaana ay dhiseyso isbahaysi ka dhan ah Addis Ababa.
Waxay sidoo kale ku eedeeyaan inay xiriir iyo taageero la leedahay maleeshiyaadka Fano ee gobolka Amxaarada.
Xaaladdan ayaa dhalisay walaac weyn oo ku saabsan in labada dal, oo horey u soo maray dagaallo soo noqnoqday, ay mar kale u jiheystaan colaad ba'an.
Waxaa sidoo kale la tilmaamayaa in quwadaha shisheeye ee saameynta ku leh gobolka ay door ku leeyihiin sii hurinta xiisadaha.
Falanqeeyayaal ayaa ka digaya in xiisadda u dhexeysa Sacuudi Carabiya iyo Imaaraadka Carabta ay ku fidi karto Itoobiya, Ereteriya, Soomaaliya, Suudaan iyo Jabuuti.
Sidoo kale, tallaabada lama filaanka ah ee Israa'iil ay ku aqoonsatay Somaliland in ay tahay dal madax-bannaan, iyo arrimaha la xiriira quwadaha shisheeye sida Turkiga oo sii ballaarinaya saamayntiisa gobolka, ayaa muujinaya sida ay arrimuhu u murugsan yihiin.

Nidaamka Sir dhowrka
BBC waxaa ka go'an ilaalinta xogtaada gaarka ah iyo tan qoyskaagaba marka aad isticmaalaysaan adeegyada BBC. Si aad u hesho adeegyada kala duwan ee BBC oo buuxa, waxaa mararka qaar loo baahan yahay in la uruuriyo wararkaaga.
Mar walba oo aad soo gudbiso wararkaas, waxaa sharcigu na farayaa in warkaaga aan u adeegsanno si waafaqsan dhamaan sharciyada UK ee ku saabsan ilaalinta wararka gaarka ah, kuwaas oo uu ku jiro sharciga ilaalinta xogta ee soo baxay 1998.
Boggaga internetka waxay wataan tilmaamo kugu sii xirayo boggag kale oo qayb sadexaad ah. BBC mas'uul kama aha waxa ku qoran boggaga aan BBC ahayn, isticmaalkaaga boggagaas qatarta ka iman karta mas'uul kama ihin.
Marka aad gasho si aad uga qaybqaadato ama si aad u hesho mid ka mid ah adeegyada boggaga kale BBC sida wargaysyada, tartamada, wada sheekaysiga tooska ah iyo guddiyada fariimaha, waxaa dhici karta in aad ku waydiinno warar gaar ah oo kugu saabsan. Waxaa ku jira kara magacaaga, cinwaanka emailkaaga, cinwaankaaga boostada, telephone ama telefoonka gacanta ama taariikhda dhalashada.
Hadii aad galiso faahfaahintaas meelaha lagaa dalbo, waxaad BBC u ogolaanaysaa iyo adeegyadeeda cidda gudbisa in ay kuu soo gudbiyaan adeegyada aad doorato.
BBC waxay kaloo adeegsataa aqbaar kaydiyayaasha (Cookies). Cookie waa qayb yar oo kaydisa wararka ku soo saabsan xulashadaada boggaga, ogolaanaysana in boggaga ay u qaabayso si ku haboon danayntada. Waad ku hagaajin kartaa internet-kaagu in uu aqbalo dhamaan aqbaar kaydiyayaasha, si aad ugu wargaliso marka aqbaar kaydiye la samaynayo ama in aadan heli wax aqbaar kaydiye ah (Cookies).
Si la mid ah, waxaan uruurinaa cinwaanada IP (Cinwaanka IP waa nambar si gaar ah loogu garan karo computer kasta ama qalab kale ee internet-ka loo adeegsado. Waxaan adeegsanaa barnaamijka lafaguridda si uu u eego cinwaanada IP iyo aqbaar kaydiyayaasha, iyadoo ujeedadu tahay in la horumariyo khibradaada adeegsiga. Waxaa kaloo aan u isticmaalaynaa cinwaanka IP si aan u go'aansanno in aad ka soo galayso adeegyada BBC meel gudaha ama dibedda UK ah.
Hadii aad da' ahaan jirto 16 ama ka yar, fadlan soo hel fasaxa waalidkaa ama qofka mas'uulka kaa ah ka hor inta mar walba oo aad wararkaaga gaarka ah galinayso boggaga BBC. Adeegsadayaasha aan haysan ogolaanshaha looma ogolaan doono in ay gudbiyaan warkooda shaqsiga ah.
Sidee BBC u adeegsan doontaa wararka ay kaa uruuriso? BBC oo kaliya waxay isticmaali doontaa aqbaarta gaarka ah sababo dhowr ah awgood oo ay ku jiraan "ujeeddo dhinaca maamulidda adeega ah" taasoo macnuhu yahay in BBC ay dhici karto in ay kula soo xiriirto arrimo ku saabsan adeeg aad ku biirtay.
Waxaa aqbaartaada ay mar walba ahaanaysaa mid qarsoodi ah inta aan ka ahayn meelaha loo baahan yahay in aan la qarin ama sharcigu ogol yahay. Hadii aad galiso ama dirto aflagaado, wax aan haboonayn ama wax aan la ogolayn meel ka mid ah ama bbc.co.uk, BBC waxaa dhici karta in ay aqbaarta gaarka ah ee ay kaa hayso ay u adeegsato in ay joojiso dhaqamadaas oo kale.
Ilaa intee ayay BBC kaydinaysaa wararkaaga? Waxaan haynaynaa aqbaarta kuu goonida ah oo ku jiraya system ilaa iyo inta ay lagama maarmaan u noqoto adeega ay isticmaashay. Meelaha aad wax ku biiriso bogga BBC, waxaa dhici karta sheekadaada sida guud in oo kaliya la hayo intii macquul ee loogu baahan yahay oo la xiriira sababaha markii horeba aad u soo gudbisay. 'Ma ahi Muslim laakiin waxaan soomaa bisha Ramadaan'
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Dad badan ayaa sooma bisha Rabadaan iyaga oo gudanaya waajib diini ah oo saaran ama waxay rajeynayaan in ay ajar ka helaan.
Sidoo kale waxa jira qaar kale oo sooma sannad kasta si ay ugu dhowaadaan Rabbigooda.
Hase yeeshee, qaar ayaa u sooma sababo kale dartood, sida in ay xishoonayaan dad kale ama in ay ka baqayaan in ay wax ku cunaan goob dadweyne.
Laakiin dad badan oo Muslimiin ah, soonku waa arrin aad u muhiimsan diin ahaan; waana cibaado qarsoon oo ay u sameeyaan si ay ugu dhowaadaan Rabbigooda.
Laakiin maxaa sababa in dadka aan diintan rumaysnayn ama aan baran Islaamku ay sannad kasta u soomaan Ramadaanka?
Dalalka Carbeed qaarkood, dadkaas waxaa loogu yeeraa "Cibaadeystayaasha Ramadaanka", taasoo loola jeedo kuwa aan cibaado samayn sannadka oo dhan marka laga reebo bisha Ramadaan.
Qaybta Carabiga ee BBC-da ayaa la xiriirtay haween iyo rag ka kala yimid dalal Carbeed oo kala duwan si ay uga wareysato sababaha ku kallifay inay sidaas sameeyaan.
Waxaan qarinnay diintooda sababo gaar ah awgood, hase yeeshee way oggolaadeen inay hadlaan iyaga oo aan shaacin diimahooda.
Fouad oo ka yimid Lubnaan ayaa noo sheegay in uu u soomo Ramadaanka si uu u raadsado barakada sannadka, sida dadka qaar u arkaan bilowga sannadka cusub.
Wuxuu yiri: "Sida dadka intooda badan ay u sameeyaan go'aanno bilowga sannad kasta si ay u helaan barako iyo horumar, aniguna waxaan u arkaa Ramadaanka fursad aan ku hagaajiyo caafimaadkayga oo aan ku barto dabeecado cusub."
Wuxuu intaas ku daray: "Soonka bil dhan ah wuxuu i siinayaa fursad aan ku barto dabeecado cusub sida samir iyo adkaysi."
Kaddib markii uu dib ugu soo laabtay Lubnaan, Fouad wuu joojiyay soonka.
"Haddii aan halkan ku soomo, waxay u ekaan lahayd munaafaqnimo, sidii in aan dadka igu dhow tusayo inaanan diinta beddelin. Waxay u ekaan lahayd i naan ka qarinayo xaqiiqda caqiidadayda, aniguna taas ma doonayo."
Xigashada Sawirka, Khaled DESOUKI / AFP
Ma aha Fouad oo keliya, dad badan oo kale ayaa soonku wuxuu ula muuqdaa dhaqan iyo hidde soo jireen ah.
Basma, oo asal ahaan ka soo jeedda Tuniisiya kuna nool Yurub, waxay bilowdaa diyaarinta Ramadaanka toddobaadyo ka hor inta aanay bishu bilan, inkastoo aysan raacin diin gaar ah, isla markaana aysan samayn wax cibaado ah sannadka oo dhan.
Xigashada Sawirka, Yassine Gaidi/Anadolu Agency
Helidda xasilloonida nafeed waa mid ka mid ah sababaha ay Ragheda oo ka soo jeeda Lubnaan u soonto Ramadaanka.
Waxay tiri, "Soonku wuxuu ka caawiyaa helitaanka xasillooni gudaha ah iyo xoojinta awoodda maskaxda. Wuxuu qofka siinayaa fursad uu ku helo daganaansho maskaxeed isaga oo ka xakameynaya fikirka ku saabsan cuntada islamarkaana ka fogaada meelaha buuqa leh."
Intii ay dhalinyarada ahayd iyo qaangaarnimadeedaba, Ragheda waxay ahayd qof si weyn diinta u raaca, laakiin goor dambe ayay ka tagtay dhammaan cibaadada diimeed. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, waxay sii wadatay soonka sababta oo ah waxay u aragtay "mid ay faa'iido ka helayso."
Xigashada Sawirka, Saqib Majeed/SOPA
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Nin kale oo ka soo jeeda Lubnaan ayaa isna waxa uu u soomaa sidii uu naftiisa u bari lahaa samir iyo dulqaad.
Isagu isku ma arko in uu raaco diin gaar ah, wuxuuna yiri, "Markii aan noolaa xilligii Mu'tazila oo aanan raacin wax diimeed oo iga horjoogsan lahaa in aan fahmo caqiidadooda, waxaan u arkaa soonka fursad aan naftayda ugu tababaro dulqaadka, samirka, iyo xusuusinta dadka kale."
Dhanka kale, Iimaan oo ka soo jeedda Masar ayaa sheegtay in ay u soonto si ay xidhiidhka Alle u xoojiso. Iman waxay horay u billaabi jirtay soonka sunnaha ah ka hor inta aysan bilaabin Ramadaanka, hase yeeshee mararka qaar waxay u joojisaa sababo la xiriira caafimaad darro.
Iman waxay la nooshahay xaalad caafimaad oo culus oo ka dhigta in ay dareento inay lumisay qayb ka mid ah xubinteeda jirka, sidaas darteed soonku wuxuu u noqdaa hab ay ku dareento raaxo iyo yareynta dhibaatada.
Inkastoo aysan raacin barashada Islaamka, Iman waxay sheegtay inay ku raaxaysato soonka sababtoo ah wuxuu ka caawiyaa inay nafteeda ku barato dulqaad iyo samir.
