Learn how the BBC is working to strengthen trust and transparency in online news
The BBC is recognised by audiences in the UK and around the world as a provider of news that you can trust. Our website, like our TV and radio services, strives for journalism that is accurate, impartial, independent and fair.
Our editorial values say: "The trust that our audience has in all our content underpins everything that we do. We are independent, impartial and honest. We are committed to achieving the highest standards of accuracy and impartiality and strive to avoid knowingly or materially misleading our audiences.
"Our commitment to impartiality is at the heart of that relationship of trust. In all our output we will treat every subject with an impartiality that reflects the full range of views. We will consider all the relevant facts fairly and with an open mind."
We know that identifying credible journalism on the internet can be a confusing experience. We also know that audiences want to understand more about how BBC journalism is produced.
For these reasons, BBC News is making even greater efforts to explain what type of information you are reading or watching on our website, who and where the information is coming from, and how a story was crafted the way it was. By doing so, we can help you judge for yourself why BBC News can be trusted.
We are also making these indicators of trustworthy journalism "machine-readable", meaning that they can be picked up by search engines and social media platforms, helping them to better identify reliable sources of information too.
The BBC has long had its own Editorial Guidelines that apply to all of our content and set out the standards expected of our journalists. To make it easier to see how BBC guidelines are used in our newsroom, we have listed all the relevant sections on this page.
Mission Statement: The mission of the BBC is to act in the public interest, serving all audiences through the provision of impartial, high-quality and distinctive output and services that inform, educate and entertain. Full details are in the BBC Charter.
Ownership Structure, Funding and Grants: We are independent of outside interests and arrangements that could undermine our editorial integrity. Our audiences should be confident that our decisions are not influenced by outside interests, political or commercial pressures, or any personal interests. Learn more about how BBC News is funded, in the UK and internationally, in the BBC Charter on the independence of the BBC.
Founding Date: The BBC was founded on 18 October 1922. Read more about the history of the BBC.
Ethics Policy: The BBC's Editorial Guidelines outline the editorial values and practices that all our output is expected to conform to.
Diversity Policy: Learn about BBC News' commitment to diversity in the BBC Charter.
Diversity Staffing Report: Find out about how BBC News is working to increase diversity in the BBC's Equality Information Report.
Corrections: The BBC is committed to achieving due accuracy. Policies relating to corrections can be found in the following sections of our Editorial Guidelines.
Our output must be well sourced, based on sound evidence, thoroughly tested and presented in clear, precise language. We should be honest and open about what we don't know and avoid unfounded speculation. Claims, allegations, material facts and other content that cannot be corroborated should normally be attributed.
We are open in acknowledging mistakes when they are made and encourage a culture of willingness to learn from them.
If an article has been edited since publication to correct a material inaccuracy, a note will be added at the end of the text to signal to the reader there has been an amendment or correction with the date of that change. If there is a small error in a story that does not alter its editorial meaning (eg name misspelling), the correction will be made without an additional note.
Unless content is specifically made available only for a limited time period, there is a presumption that material published online will become part of a permanently accessible archive and will not normally be removed. Exceptional circumstances may include legal reasons, personal safety risks, or a serious breach of editorial standards that cannot be rectified except by removal of the material.
Verification/Fact-checking Standards: The BBC's accuracy and verification policy is outlined in the Editorial Guidelines on Accuracy.
Unnamed Sources: The BBC's policy and guidance on the use of anonymous sources is detailed in the Editorial Guidelines.
Actionable Feedback: The BBC's complaints procedure is outlined in the BBC Complaints Framework.
Leadership: Meet the senior executive team that runs the news division: BBC News Board.
BBC News articles based on original reporting carry bylines (the name of the journalist), as often do those authored by journalists who have a subject specialism.
General news stories, which tend to combine information from a variety of sources, including news agencies, BBC Newsgathering and BBC broadcast output, or which may have been produced by several members of staff over the course of the day, do not as a rule carry bylines.

Where BBC News relies on a single source for a key aspect of its coverage, we will strive to credit that source, where possible. We usually link to official reports, sets of statistics and other sources of information, to enable you to judge for yourself the underlying information that we are reporting on.
Whenever appropriate, we also offer links to relevant third-party websites that provide additional information, source material or informed comment.
For in-depth pieces of work, such as complex investigations or data journalism projects, we will help you understand how we went about our work by showing the underlying data and by disclosing any caveats, assumptions or other methodological frameworks used - for example, the study-design; the sample size; representativeness; margins of error; how the data was collected; geographical relevance and time periods.

Faahfaahin: Maxay muujinayaan sawirrada la sii daayey ee qolka hogaaminta dagaalka ee Trump uu kala socday weerarrada Iiraan?
Xigashada Sawirka, The white house
Aqalka Cad ayaa soo saaray afar sawir oo laga soo qaaday madaxweyne Trump iyo xubno ka tirsan golihiisa wasiirrada oo dusha kala socday duqaymaha cirka ee Iiraan, oo ay fuliyeen ciidamada Maraykanka iyo Israa'iil.
Marka si dhow loo eego dadka la sawiray iyo tafaasiisha soo baxaysa waxa ay daaha ka qaadaysaa wax badan oo ku saabsan waxa qolka ka dhacayay xilliyadaas ay xaaladdu kacsanayd.
Marka ay madaxweynayaasha Maraykanku bilaabaan tallaabo milatari, waxay sida caadiga ah sidaas ka sameeyaan gudaha xarun ammaan ah oo ku taal Aqalka Cad, taasoo si gaar ah loogu nashqadeeyey ujeedadaas, loona yaqaano qolka dagaalka.
Laakin Donald Trump ma uusan joogin Aqalka Cad markii ay billaabatay tallaabada militari saacadihii hore ee Sabtidii. Waxa uu joogay Mar-a-Lago, gurigiisa raaxada ee Florida, halkaas oo uu sidoo kale uu kala socday inta badan dhacdooyinkii Axadda, isagoo uu la hadlayey saxaafadda.
Qolka dagaalka ee Mar-a-Lago ayaa si buuxda loogu qalabeeyay madaxweynaha si uu halkaas ugala socdo dhaq-dhaqaaqyada ciidan, sidii uu horayba u sameeyay.
Mar-a-Lago ayaa laga sameeyey xarun macluumaadka sirta ah loogu talagalay, waxaana markii ugu horreysay la sameeyay 2017 ayadoo dib loo aasaasay ka hor inta uusan Trump ku soo laaban Madaxtooyada.
Xigashada Sawirka, The white house
Gelitaanka aagga si adag ayaa loo kontaroolaa, iyadoo leh sharciyo adag oo ku saabsan isticmaalka aaladaha elegtarooniga ah.
Sawir la qaaday ayaa muujinaya Donald Trump oo qaba koofiyad cad oo uu ku xardhan yahay magaca Maraykanka, isagoo kormeeraya xaaladda Iiraan.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Waxay u muuqataa inay la mid tahay goobtii uu ka soo kormeeray hawlgalkii lagu qabtay madaxweynaha Venezuela Nicolás Maduro bishii Janaayo.
Khariidadda weyn ee xagga dambe waxay muujinaysaa goobaha ay joogaan millatariga ee muhiimka ah ee gobolka, oo ay ku jiraan laba kooxood oo ah dayaaradaha weerarka qaada iyo saldhigyo ay deggan yihiin ciidammada Maraykanka.
Dheemanka casaanka ah ayaa muujinaya bartilmaameedyada ballaaran ee Iiraan gudaheeda oo ah farqi muhiim ah oo ka duwan weerarradii diiradda lagu saaray ee ay Mareykanka iyo Israa'iil ku qaadeen xarumaha Nukliyeerka Iiraan bishii Juun ee la soo dhaafay.
Hore waxaa fadhiya laakinse aysan kaamaradu aysan si fiican u qaban agaasimaha CIA John Ratcliffe oo u muuqda inuu la hadlayo madaxweynaha waqtiga saxda ah ee sawirka la qaaday.
Wararka ayaa sheegaya in CIA-da ay muddo bilo ah ku raad joogtay Ayatollah Cali Khamenei oo ay mas'uul ka ahayd inay go'aamiso halka uu ku sugan yahay ka hor weerarradii ugu dambeyntii lagu dilay.
Marka laga soo tago in uu noqday Xoghayaha Arrimaha Dibadda, Marco Rubio waxa uu sidoo kale u dhaqmay sidii ku simaha la taliyaha amniga qaranka sagaalkii bilood ee la soo dhaafay, taasoo ka dhigtay lataliyaha ugu weyn ee Trump ee arrimahan.
Waxa uu sidoo kale mas'uul ka ahaa wargelinta xubnaha loogu yeero "Gang of Eight," kooxda laba-geesoodka ah ee isu keenta hoggaamiyeyaasha ugu weyn ee Jamhuuriga iyo Dimuqraadiga ee Senate-ka iyo Aqalka Wakiilada, ee ku lugta leh hawlgalka Epic Fury ka hor weerarrada.

Xigashada Sawirka, The white house
Sawirkii ugu dambeeyay ee uu sii daayay Aqalka Cad ayaa muujinaya qolka dagaalka ee Washington, D.C., halkaas oo madaxweyne ku xigeenka JD Vance uu kormeeray howlgalka isaga oo ka garab sahqaynaya madaxweynaha, adeegsanayana Khadka isgaarsiinya ee teleconference. Shaabada madaxweyne ku xigeenka ayaa ka muuqata gidaarka.
Qolka dagaalku waa meel bannaan oo dhan 460-square mitir oo ka kooban saddex qol oo shirarka loogu tala galay, laguna qalabeeyay qalabka isgaarsiinta ee ugu casrisan, waxaana ka shaqeeya koox ka kooban 100 xubnood.
JD Vance, oo ka tirsanaa ciidamada Marines-ka Mareykanka muddo afar sano ah, ayaa ku dhaleeceeyay maamulladii hore inay ku lug leeyihiin iska horimaadyo hubeysan oo daba dheeraaday oo dibadda ah.
Todobaadki hore, Vance waxa uu sheegay in aysan jirin "suurtagalnimada" in ficilka Iran uu u horseedo Mareykanka "dagaal sanado qaata oo ka socda Bariga Dhexe oo aan la ogeyn dhamaadkiisa".
Waxa weheliya iyada oo ku jirta qolka qalalaasaha Tulsi Gabbard, Agaasimaha Sirdoonka Qaranka, iyo sidoo kale Xoghayaha Maaliyadda Scott Bessent iyo Xoghayaha Tamarta Chris Wright.
Axaddii ciidamada Maraykanka iyo kuwa Israa'iil waxay duqeeyeen in ka badan 1,000 bartilmaameed ah oo ku yaalla guud ahaan dalka Iiraan, iyagoo diiradda saaray xarumaha taliska iyo kantaroolka, difaaca hawada iyo goobaha gantaallada ballistic-ga ah, iyo sidoo kale xarunta guud ee ciidamada ilaalada kacaanka Islaamiga ah ee Iiraan.

Itoobiya ma waxay dib ugu laabaneysaa dagaal kale oo ka qarxa gudaheeda?
Xigashada Sawirka, AFP via Getty Images
Cabsida laga qabo in dagaal dib uga qarxo waqooyiga Itoobiya ayaa dad badan ku qasbaya in ay ka baxaan gobolka Tigray, saddex sano kadib markii uu dhammaaday dagaalkii sokeeye ee halkaas ka dhacay intii u dhexeysey 2020 illaa 2022.
"Qofkii awooda wuu duulaa, kii aan awoodinna bas ayuu raacaa," ayuu qof ku sugan magaalada Mekelle u sheegay BBC-da, isagoo intaas ku daray in tiro badan oo dhallinyaro ah ay u jiheysteen dhanka caasimadda Addis Ababa.
Qiimaha badeecooyinka ayaa si xawli ah u kacaya maadaama dadku kaydsanayaan waxyaabaha daruuriga ah, halka bangiyaduna ay xaddideen lacagta lala bixi karo maalin kasta oo ku dhow 2,000 birr ($13) qofkiiba, kadib markii bangiyada lagu qamaamay.
Gabaabsiga lacagta caddaanka ah ayaa dadka dib u xusuusinaysa dagaalkii qaraaraa ee labada sano socdey, kaas oo dhammaaday Noofambar 2022, waxayna dadka doonaya inay sameeyaan lacag wareejin waaweyn badanaa ay ku khasbanaadaan in ay bixiyaan kharash dheeri ah si ay hab danabeysan ugu diraan.
Dagaalkii sokeeye ee u dhexeeyay dowladda Itoobiya iyo Jabhadda Xoreynta Shacabka Tigray (TPLF) ayaa sababay dhimashada qiyaastii 600,000 oo qof, sida uu sheegay wakiil ka socday Midowga Afrika (AU), wuxuuna gobolka ku sigtay macluul daran.
Soo dhaweyn iyo farxad weyn ayaa lagu qaabilay heshiiskii uu Midowga Afrika dhex-dhexaadiyey bishii Noofambar 2022.
Kadib markii heshiiska lagu saxiixay caasimadda Koonfur Afrika ee Pretoria, rasaastii waa la joojiyay, adeegyada aasaasiga ahna waa la soo celiyay, nolosha gobolkuna caadi ayey ku soo noqotay.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, walaac ayaa markiiba ka dhashay maqnaanshaha laba ka mid ah dhinacyadii dagaalamayey xilligii saxiixa:
• Eritrea, oo Tigray kaga beegan waqooyi, ciidamadeeduna ay ka feer dagaallameen ciidanka Itoobiya si ay u xakameeyaan gobolka.
• Amxaaro, oo Tigray kaga beegan galbeed, dagaalyahannadeeduna ay dhinaca ciidanka Itoobiya ka barbar dagaallameen. Toddobaadyadii hore ee dagaalka waxay la wareegeen dhul ku yaalla galbeedka Tigray oo hodan ku ah beeraha, kaas oo weli muran ka taagan yahay.
Tan iyo markaas, waxaa khilaaf dhex maray dowladda Itoobiya iyo xulafadeedii hore ee Eritrea iyo maleeshiyaadkii hubaysnaa ee Amxaarada. Dowladda ayaa sidoo kale khilaaf kala dhexeeyaa TPLF, maadaama aan weli xal laga gaarin mustaqbalka dhulalka lagu muransan yahay ee Tigray, halkaas oo ay weli haystaan ciidamada Amxaaro.
Arrimahan oo dhan waxay abuureen kalsooni darro baahsan, waxayna keeneen in heshiiskii Pretoria si degdeg ah u wiiqmo.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Warar ayaa sheegaya in ciidamo la abaabulayo waqooyiga Itoobiya, halka Qaramada Midoobayna ay ku tilmaantay xaaladda gobolka mid "aad u kacsan".
Dhammaadkii Jannaayo, iska horimaadyo kooban ayaa la soo sheegay in ay dhex mareen ciidamada federaalka iyo dagaalyahannada Tigray, kuwaas oo ku baaqaya in dib loogu soo celiyo dhulalka weli gacanta Amxaaro ku jira.
Duqeymo ay fuliyeen diyaarado aan duuliye lahayn ayaa ka dhacay gobolka, duulimaadyadii tegi jirey magaalooyinka Tigray-na waa la joojiyey ku dhowaad toddobaad.
Itoobiya ayaa sidoo kale Eritrea ku eedaysay inay faragelin ku hayso arrimaha gudaha, iyadoo taageeraysa ciidamada Tigray — arrintaas oo ay Eritrea beenisay. Mas'uuliyiinta Addis Ababa-na waxay u arkaan isu soo dhowaanshaha TPLF iyo Asmara mid khatar ku ah ammaankeeda.
Bishii Oktoobar ee la soo dhaafay, wasiirka arrimaha dibadda ee Itoobiya ayaa warqad u qoray xoghayaha guud ee Qaramada Midoobay, isagoo ku eedeeyay Eritrea in ay isbahaysi la sameysay "garabka xagjirka ah ee TPLF" si ay "dagaal ugu qaaddo" Itoobiya.
Toddobaadkii hore, hoggaamiyaha TPLF Debretsion Gebremicheal ayaa sheegay in dagaal uu "daruur dagaal ay dul hoganeyso" Tigray, ayna dadka "ku khasbanaan doonaan in ay iska caabiyaan gardarro kasta si ay u sii jiraan".
Jabhadda TPLF waxay doonayaan in dib loogu soo celiyo dhulalkii ay ku waayeen dagaalka, sida galbeedka Tigray.
Ku dhowaad hal milyan oo qof ayaa ka qaxay aaggaas intii uu socday dagaalku, waxayna ku nool yihiin xeryo ku-meel-gaar ah oo ku yaalla Tigray oo xaaladoodu liidato. Ilaa haddana uma suuragelin in ay dib ugu laabtaan guryahoodii.
Go'aan ay guddiga doorashooyinka qaateen toddobaadkan, oo dhigaya in bisha Juun dhulalka lagu muransan yahay ay si madax-bannaan u codeeyaan — halkii ay ka hoos iman lahaayeen Amxaaro ama Tigray — ayaa sii kiciyay caro badan oo ka jirta Tigray.
TPLF oo intii uu socday dagaalku lagu daray liiska argagixisada, waxay sidoo kale doonaysaa in dib loogu soo celiyo aqoonsigeeda sharci ee xisbi siyaasadeed.
Hase yeeshee, arrintaas waxaa hareeyay khilaafyo, waxaana guddiga doorashooyinka dhawaan kala noqday ruqsaddii TPLF, taas oo ka dhigaysa in aysan ka qayb geli karin doorashooyinka soo socda.
Gudaha TPLF lafteeda ayaa kala qaybsanaan ka dhacday, iyadoo xubno ka mid ahi ay sameysteen xisbi cusub, taas oo sii adkaysay xaaladda horeba u cakirnayd.
Xisbiga TPLF ayaa labaatan sano si weyn ugu talinayay siyaasadda Itoobiya ilaa uu Abiy Ahmed noqday ra'iisul wasaare 2018, kuna dhawaaqay xisbi cusub oo hoggaamiyeyaasha TPLF ay diideen inay ku biiraan.
Taageerayaasha Abiy waxay xubnaha TPLF ku tilmaamaan "garab macangag ah", iyagoo ku eedeynaya in ay ku guuldareysteen fulinta heshiiska nabadda islamarkaana ay isku dhowaadeen Eritrea — taas oo beddeshay oo si weyn xulafadii gobolka marka loo eego xaaladdii 2020.
Labada dal ee dariska ah waxay lahaayeen xiriir soo raynaya — mar saaxiibo ah, marna cadow ah.
Eritrea waxay si rasmi ah uga go'day Itoobiya 1993, balse markii dambe waxaa dhex maray dagaal xuduudeed oo dhiig badan ku daatay.
Abiy Axmed ayaa xitaa ku guuleystay Abaalmarinta Nabadda ee Nobel 2019, kadib markii uu soo afjaray ismari-waa 20 sano socday oo u dhexeeyay labada dal.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, xiriirkii wanaagsanaa ee la dhidbay intii uu socday dagaalka Tigray ayaa isu beddelay hadallo kulul oo ku saabsan Badda Cas.
Itoobiya oo ah dalka ugu dadka badan dunida ee aan bad lahayn, waxay lumisay dekedihii Badda Cas markii Eritrea xornimada qaadatay, taas oo la tagtay xeeb dhan 1,350km.
Arrintan Abiy wuxuu u arkaa mid halis ku ah jiritaan Itoobiya, wuxuuna kabaha u gashaday sidii Itoobiya u yeelan lahayd dekedda koonfurta Eritrea ku taal ee Cassab — oo qiyaastii 60km u jirta xadka — isagoo xitaa tilmaamay suurtagalnimada in uu xoog ku qaato.
"Badda Cas iyo Itoobiya weligood ma kala go'i karaan," ayuu Abiy ku sheegay khudbad uu dhowaan ka jeediyay baarlamaanka.
Kacdoon heerkiisu hooseeyo ayaa ka socdey deegaanka Amxaarada tan iyo 2023, kaas oo la xiriira caro ka dhalatay in kaalintii ay gobolkaasi ku taageereen dowladda intii uu socday dagaalka Tigray balse aan si habboon looga garwaaqsan.
Dagaalyahannada halkaas ka jira waxay doonayaan in galbeedka Tigray si rasmi ah loogu daro Amxaarada.
Itoobiya ayaa sidoo kale Eritrea ku eedaysay in ay ku lug leedahay kacdoonkaas — arrintaas oo ay Eritrea mar kale beenisay.
Bishii Janaayo, ciidamada amniga federaalka ee gobolka Amxaaro ayaa sheegay in ay qabteen 50,000 oo xabbo oo rasaas ah oo ay ku eedeeyeen in Eritrea u dirtay maleeshiyaad ka soo horjeeda dowladda.
Daqarradii iyo xanuunkii dagaalkii hore weli way ka muuqdaan Tigray. Kaabayaashii burburay badankood dib looma dhisin, dhaqaalaha gobolkuna si buuxda uma soo kaban.
Shaqo la'aanta joogtada ah ayaa ku riixaysa dhallinyaro badan in ay maraan waddooyin tahriib oo khatar ah si ay fursado uga raadsadaan Yurub iyo Bariga Dhexe.
Haddii dagaal buuxa uu mar kale ka dhex qarxo ciidanka Itoobiya iyo TPLF, ama Itoobiya iyo Eritrea, Tigray ayaa u badan in ay noqoto goobta ugu weyn ee dagaalka — taas oo mar kale burburin doonta gobolka.
Sidoo kale waxay khalkhal gelin kartaa Geeska Afrika oo dhan.
Suudaan oo dhanka galbeed deris kala ah Itoobiya, ayaa horeyba u wajahaysa rabshado ba'an oo sababay mid ka mid ah qalalaasaha bini'aadantinimo ee ugu xun dunida.
"Dagaal kasta oo dhex mara Itoobiya iyo Eritrea oo ku lug leh Tigray iyo dhinacyo kale oo gudaha Itoobiya ah, aad bay u suurtagal tahay in uu ku xirmo Suudaan. Labada colaadoodna way isku milmi karaan," ayuu yiri Michael Woldemariam oo ah khabiir xiriirka caalamiga ah ee fadhigiisu yahay Maraykanka oo BBC-da u warramay.
Cadaadis diblomaasiyadeed oo badanaa ka imaanayey Maraykanka, ayaa loo arkayey furaha heshiiskii nabadda ee 2022.
Dalalka Khaliijka ayaa hadda si weyn ugu lug leh gobolka, sidaas darteed cadaadis ka yimaada iyaguna wuxuu ka baajin karaa colaado kale oo halis ah.
Isutagga Imaaraadka Carabta (UAE) ayaa la sheegay inuu xiriir dhow la leeyahay Addis Ababa, halka Sacuudi Carabiya la rumeysan yahay in ay ka dhowdahay Casmara.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, Michael rajo badan ma qabo.
Wuxuu tilmaamay in markaan "Midowga Afrika uusan haysan awooddii saameynta lahayd", Maraykankuna uu ku mashquulsan yahay arrimo kale, halka dalalka Khaliijkuna ay kala aragti duwan yihiin.

Dhegeyso: Maxay dawladda Soomaaliya ka tiri eedeynta mucaaradka ee wadahadalladii lagu kala booday
Dowladda Soomaaliya ayaa jawaab kasoo saartay shirkii wadatashiga ee lagu kala kacay horraantii todobaadkaan magaalada Muqdisho, iyada oo mucaaradka ku eedeesay in ay miiska keeneen ajandayaal ka baxsan wixii laga wada hadlayay.
Wasiir ku xigeenka warfaafinta ee Soomaaliya Cabdiraxmaan Al Cadaala oo warsaxaafadeedka u akhriyey warbaahinta ayaa waraysi gaar ah sidoo kale siiyey BBC.
Jawaabta wasiir ku xigeenka ayaa ku salaysnayd hadalkii mucaaradka ee ahaa in shirka uu ku dhamaaday "natiijo la'aan". Wuxuu sheegay in dawladdu diyaar u tahay "inay dhegeysato ra'yiga mucaaradka".

Sidee isaga ilaalin kartaa gaajada iyo haraadka inta lagu jiro soonka?
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Marka la gaadho bilowga bisha Ramadaan, Muslimiinta ku nool daafaha dunida Islaamka waxay bilaabaan cibaadada soonka, taas oo ah mid ka mid ah tiirarka diinta Islaamka, isla markaana u baahan in laga soomo cuntada iyo cabbitaanka laga bilaabo waaberiga ilaa qorrax dhaca bisha oo dhan.
Inkasta oo soonku leeyahay faa'iidooyin caafimaad, haddana qaar ka mid ah dadka ayaa la kulma dhibaato ku saabsan la qabsiga isbeddelka degdegga ah ee caadooyinkooda cunto inta lagu jiro bisha, halka qaar kalena ay dareemaan daal iyo tabar-darro ka dhalata ka fogaanshaha cuntada iyo cabbitaanka muddooyin dheer. Mararka qaarkood arrintan waxaa la socon kara dhibaatooyin caafimaad sida kuwa qaba sonkorowga ama dhiig-karka.
Qoraalkan, waxaan ku iftiiminaynaa talooyin muhiim ah oo ay soo jeediyaan khubarada nafaqada si loo helo soon caafimaad leh. BBC Af-Carabi ayaa la hadashay dad dhowr ah si loo soo bandhigo waayo-aragnimadooda gaarka ah oo laga yaabo inay dad badan ka caawiso qorsheynta sida ay u qaadanayaan waqtigooda bisha Ramadaan, iyadoo ay barbar socdaan khubarada nafaqada oo soo jeedinaya hababka iyo xeeladaha ugu waxtarka badan ee la raaco si loo helo caafimaad wanaagsan.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Qofka sooman wuxuu bilaabaa maalintiisa koowaad cuntada suxuurta, waxa uu halkaas ku doorto inuu cuno ayaana go'aaminaya inta uu dareemi doono ama uusan u dareemi doonin daal, harraad ama gaajo inta uu sooman yahay.
Khabiirka nafaqada Faadi Cabbaas wuxuu ku talinayaa in la raaco talooyinkan si loo helo soon fudud, jidhka oo aan si fudud u qalalin, iyo faa'iido caafimaad oo weyn:
Cabbaas wuxuu yiri: "Suxuurta waa in diiradda la saaraa cuntooyinka qiyaastii boqolkiiba 70 ka kooban biyo, cuntadana waa in loo cunaa saddex marxaladood oo u dhexeeya mid kasta shan daqiiqo. Waxaa lagu bilaabaa saxan salad ah (gaar ahaan qajaar, saladh cagaaran iyo kabsar), iyo hal nooc oo cunto ah oo aan cusbo badan lahayn, maadaama cuntooyinka cusbada leh sida farmaajada iyo lawska, inkastoo ay nafaqo badan leeyihiin, haddana ay jidhka ka dhigaan inuu u baahdo biyo badan saacado yar ka dib.
Wuxuu intaas ku daray: "Marxaladda labaad waxaa la qaataa sonkor dabiici ah, sida laba xabbo oo miro biyo badan leh (tusaale ahaan istaroobari, qaraha ama liin macaan) ama koob casiir dabiici ah, ka dibna cuntada waxaa lagu soo gabagabeeyaa cabitaanka biyo."
Adeegga Caafimaadka Qaranka ee Ingiriiska wuxuu ku talinayaa in laga fogaado shaaha iyo qaxwaha maadaama ay kordhiyaan kaadida oo ay ku jiraan kafeyn (gaar ahaan dadka qaba dhibaatada kaadi baxa aan la xakamayn). Luminta dareeraha jidhka waxay keentaa in loo baahdo in la magdhabo, waxaana dhici kara qalayl sababa madax-xanuun, cadaadiska dhiigga oo hoos u dhaca, dhibaatooyin kelyaha ah iyo kuwo kale.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Haddaba sidee looga fogaadaa dhibaatooyinkan? Maxaase laga sameeyaa dareenka daalka ama caajiska ka dib afurka?
Miisaska Ramadaanka iyadoon loo eegin heerka dhaqaale ee qoys kasta — waxay caan ku yihiin kala duwanaanta cuntooyinka maalin kasta, taas oo ka dhalata caadada ah in qaraabada iyo derisku isu dhiibaan cuntooyin kala duwan inta lagu jiro bisha. Sidaas darteed qofku wuxuu cuni karaa wax ka badan inta uu u baahan yahay, wuxuuna dareemaa waxyeellada arrintaas wax yar ka dib marka uu dhammeeyo afurka.
Waxaa bilaabma dhibaatooyin sida calool-xanuun, dareen buux-dhaaf ah, caajis iyo rabitaan hurdo, iyo waxyaabo kale. Qaar ka mid ah dadka ayay arrintu uga sii dari kartaa, gaar ahaan haddii ay keento korodhka cadaadiska dhiigga ama sonkorta dhiigga.
Sida uu sheegay Faadi Cabbaas, maalmaha ugu horreeya ee soonka ayaa ah kuwa ugu adag, sababtoo ah jidhku wuxuu bilaabaa inuu u adeegsado dufanka il tamar ahaan kaddib afar maalmood oo soon ah.
Cabbaas wuxuu ku talinayaa in afurka sidoo kale loo qaato saddex marxaladood, iyadoo u dhexeysa mid kasta lix daqiiqo, sida suxuurta oo kale. Sababtu waa in maskaxdu u baahan tahay 18 daqiiqo si ay u hesho calaamadda dheregga.
Wuxuu yiri: "Marxaladda koowaad waxaa lagu talinayaa in la cabo hal koob oo biyo ah, saddex jeer oo yar-yar, iyadoo la fadhiyo. Lix daqiiqo ka dib, waxaa la qaataa sonkor dabiici ah si jidhka loogu celiyo tamartii uu waayay inta lagu jiray soonka, sida timir ama casiir midho cusub."
Wuxuu sii raaciyay: "Marka la sugo lix daqiiqo kale, waxaa lagu talinayaa in la bilaabo saxan salad ah oo si fiican loo jarjaray si aan caloosha loo culaysin. Fiber-ka ku jira khudaarta aad ayuu muhiim ugu yahay helitaanka fitamiinnada iyo ka hortagga calool-fadhiga."
Intaas ka dib, waxaa la cunaa hal ama laba nooc oo cunto ah ugu badnaan, kuwaas oo ka kooban borotiin iyo karbohaydrayt.
Tusaale ahaan, baradho, bariis, baasto, rooti iyo cuntooyinka cajiinka ah dhammaantood waa karbohaydrayt, sidaas darteed waa in la doortaa hal nooc oo keliya oo ka mid ah, laguna daro hal nooc oo borotiin ah (sida digirta, ukunta, hilibka aan baruurta lahayn ama caanaha), iyadoo la tixgelinayo waqtiga calalinta oo u dhexeeya 30 ilbiriqsi cunto jilicsan iyo 60 ilbiriqsi cunto adag sida hilibka iyo lawska.
Inkasta oo jidhku aad ugu baahan yahay biyo, haddana cabitaanka biyo badan hal mar iyo si khaldan loo cabo waxay saameyn ku yeelan kartaa shaqada mindhicirrada iyo kelyaha. Sidaas darteed waa in la raaco hab caafimaad leh: lama cabbo wax ka badan laba koob oo biyo ah hal mar ka hor inta aan saacad laga gaarin afurka, mana habboona in la sugo ilaa la dareemo harraad. Waa in la cabaa biyo saacad kasta ama saacad iyo bar kasta, xitaa haddii loo baahdo in la sameeyo digniin ku xasuusisa waqtiga cabitaanka biyaha, sida uu ku talinayo Cabbaas.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Ma aha qof walba mid ku fiican ka fakarka iyo qorshaynta hore ee bishan. Qaar badan ayaa aad u dhibtooda sababtoo ah isbeddel degdeg ah oo ku yimaadda caadooyinka cuntada iyo kuwa bulsho, taas oo keenta dhibaatooyin saameeya xiriirkooda bulshada iyo tayada shaqadooda, sida ku dhacday labada walaal ee Saciid iyo Cusmaan Yuusuf oo ka shaqeeya dhismaha magaalada Xalab.
Saciid wuxuu yidhi: "Inkasta oo aan ogahay in aan bisha barakaysan ku sabro oo aan dulqaad yeesho, haddana marka la gaadho duhurnimada waxaan noqdaa qof xanaaq badan. Ma xakameyn karo dabeecaddayda, mararka qaarna waan ku qayliyaa shaqaalaha, dabadeed waan ka qoomameeyaa oo waan ka raalli gelinayaa, balse arrintu marar badan ayay igu soo noqnoqotaa."
Walaalkiis Cusmaan wuxuu yidhi: "Maalmaha ugu horreeya waan u adkeysan karaa gaajada, laakiin toddobaad ka dib waxaan dareemaa harraad daran oo madax-xanuun igu keena, markaasna waxaan noqdaa qof aan la qaadi karin, mana awoodo inaan xakameeyo xanaaqayga."
Dhibaatadan kuma koobna Saciid iyo Cusmaan oo keliya, balse rag badan ayay ku dhacdaa. Sidaas darteed waxaa habboon in la raaco talooyinka khubarada nafaqada, maadaama cuntada aad cunaysaa ay door weyn ku leedahay dabeecaddaada.
Arrintan ayuu ka hadlay Maxamed Faayid, oo ah khabiir cilmiga cuntada iyo nafaqada ah oo ku sugan Marooko. Wuxuu yiri: "Guud ahaan haweenku way ka adkaysi badan yihiin soonka marka loo eego ragga, sababtoo ah boqolkiiba baruurta jidhkooda ayaa ka badan tan ragga, halka raggu ay leeyihiin murqo ka badan kuwa haweenka."
Sida uu sheegay Faayid, arrintani waxay leedahay sababo cilmiyeed oo la xidhiidha hoormoonnada; qaar ayaa firfircoon haweenka, qaarna ragga.
"Hoormoonka istaroojinku wuxuu ka caawiyaa haweenka inay u adkaystaan gaajada oo ay muddo dheer ku sii nagaadaan xaalad deggan, taas oo ka caawisa inay ka adkaadaan kacsanaanta iyo welwelka. Halka hoormoonka tistostiroonku ee ragga uu kordhiyo dareenka xanaaqa, walbahaarka iyo diiqadda."
Faayid wuxuu intaas ku daray: "Jidhka haweeneydu guud ahaan wuxuu u baahan yahay cunto ka yar tan ninka. Cunista badan ee hilibka, digaagga iyo farmaajada waxay kicisaa soo saarista hoormoonno saameeya xaaladda neerfaha, maadaama istaroojinku la falgalo kolestaroolka. Sidaas darteed hilibka badan wuxuu kordhiyaa kolestaroolka, taas oo keenta kacsanaan iyo xanaaq."
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Guud ahaan, dalalka bariga, raggu waxay u janjeeraan dhaqdhaqaaq badan marka loo eego haweenka, sababtoo ah nooca shaqadooda ama mas'uuliyadaha ka baxsan guriga. Tani waxay ka dhigan tahay inay lumiyaan tamar iyo kalooriyo ka badan haweenka. Hase yeeshee xaaladdu way ka duwan tahay haweeneyda shaqaysa, oo dusha ka saaran yihiin masuuliyado waaweyn sida daryeelka carruurta, hawlaha guriga iyo shaqada dibadda. Xaaladdan, waxay la mid noqotaa ninka, mararka qaarna xitaa dadaal labanlaab ah ayay bixisaa.
Faayid wuxuu aaminsan yahay in nooca cuntadu uu si toos ah u saameeyo niyadda qofka. Dadka cuna hilib badan waxay u janjeeraan inay noqdaan kuwo kacsan oo walbahaar badan marka loo eego dadka cuna khudradda oo keliya.
Wuxuu sheegay in haweeneyda cunta qaddarka hilibka iyo farmaajada ee uu cuno ninku ay la kulmi karto isla xaaladaha xanaaqa iyo kacsanaanta ee ragga ku dhaca.
Salaadda taraawiixda looma tixgeliyo jimicsi ku filan oo jidhka ka saara kalooriyada dheeraadka ah sida ay qaar u malaynayaan. Sidaas darteed waa in la sameeyaa jimicsi kordhiya garaaca wadnaha, sida ay ku talisay khabiir nafaqada oo ku sugan London, Aysun Kafang.
Waxay tidhi: "Calooshu waa inay si buuxda ugu nasataa dheefshiidka ka hor inta aan la bilaabin jimicsi, taas oo macnaheedu yahay in la bilaabo ugu yaraan saddex saacadood ka dib afurka."
Waxay intaas ku dartay: "Maalmaha ugu horreeya waa in aan jidhka la culaysin, lana sameeyo jimicsi fudud sida socodka, qaadista miisaan yar oo guriga yaal ama kor u kaca jaranjarada dhowr jeer, ka dibna maalin kasta si tartiib ah loo kordhiyo muddada ilaa laga gaadho heer ku habboon awoodda iyo caafimaadka qofka."
Kafang waxay sharraxday muhiimadda biyaha iyo doorkooda weyn ee ilaalinta caafimaadka guud, gaar ahaan bisha Ramadaan. Waxay si xooggan ugu talisay in la cabo qaddarka biyaha ee lagu taliyay iyadoo loo eegayo da'da qofka, lagana fogaado cabitaannada kaarboonaysan iyo kuwa sonkorta lagu daro, laguna beddelo cabitaanno dhir ah sida shaah cagaaran iyo kuwo kale oo si ballaaran looga helo dunida oo dhan.
Anqaam, oo ah haweeney guri-joog ah oo leh laba carruur ah kuna nool magaalada Riyaad ee Sucuudiga, waxay aaminsan tahay in qorshaynteeda hore ee bisha Ramadaan ay uga dhigto bishan mid ay ku horumariso caafimaadkeeda, ku kobciso xirfadaheeda, isla markaana ku dareento qanacsanaan nafteeda ah.
Waxay u sheegtay BBC: "Waxaan bilaabay soon kala go'an toddobaad ka hor inta aan la gaadhin Ramadaan, sababtoo ah sidaas ayaan jidhkayga ugu diyaariyaa inuu u adkaysto gaajada, isla markaana uga hortagaa isbeddel degdeg ah oo ku yimaadda nidaamkayga maalinlaha ah inta lagu jiro Ramadaan."
Waxay intaas ku dartay: "Sannad kasta waxaan is hor dhigaa yool aan doonayo inaan gaadho. Sannadkan waxaan qorsheeyay inaan Qur'aanka dhammeeyo laba jeer inta lagu jiro bishan, isla markaana aan carruurtayda xifdiyo qaar ka mid ah aayadaha Qur'aanka, anigoo isla mar ahaantaana daryeelaya carruurtayda oo ku mashquulsan waajibaadka guriga. Sidaas ayuu waqtigu ku dhaafaa anigoon dareemin."
Naadiya, oo ah gabar 25 jir ah kuna nool magaalada Caqaba ee Urdun, waxay tidhi: "Waxaan gaajada iyo haraadka kula dagaallamaa akhriska. Sidaas darteed waxaan waqtigayga ku qaataa akhrinta dhammaan buugaagta iyo sheekooyinka aan dib u dhigtay, sidoo kalena waxaan daawadaa qaar ka mid ah barnaamijyada telefishinka, waxaanan horumariyaa xirfaddayda luqadda Ingiriisiga. Sidaas darteed ma jiro waqti firaaqo ah oo igu kallifa inaan ka fikiro harraad ama gaajo."

Cunto laga helo guryaha Soomaalida oo ay isticmaali jireen boqorrada oo kaliya
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Waa nooc mulawax ah oo aad u jilicsan oo laga jecel yahay Koonfurta Aasiya, isla markaana si weyn loogu cuno digaag lagu kariyey subag. Cunytada noocan ah waa mid ka mid ah cuntooyinka ugu caansan gobolkaas.
Keliya digaag laguma cuno ee malawaxaas waxaa lala cunaa cuntooyin kale oo badan, wuxuuna ka mid yahay waxyaabaha lama huraanka u ah ee aan sinaba uga maqnaan karin miiska cuntada ee gobolka. Waxa lagu daraa alaabo kale oo dhadhan kala duwan u sameeya.
Malaha sababtaas awgeed ayuu malawaxani caan uga noqday dunida oo dhan. Dhawaan ayaa nooc ka mid ah rootigan oo toon lagu daraywaxay caan ka noqotay kuwa ugu wanaagsan dunida. Marka la diyaarinayo waxa lagu daraa subag sixin ah oo lagu mariyo malawax diirran, kadibna lagu dul rusheeyo toon la jarjaray.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, waxa laga yaabaa inay dad badan u noqoto arrin cusub in malawaxa oo meel kasta laga helo uu dadka qaarkiis u yahay cunnada ugu wanaasgan.
Waxa la sheegayaa in cuntadani ay ka mid ahaan jirtay kuwa ugu qaalisan ee la siin jiray boqorradii muslimiinta. Haddaba, sidee ayuu malwaxani uga soo baxay jikadii boqortooyada una soo gaadhay miisaska caadiga ah ee dadweynaha caalamku ku cunteeyaan?
Fadlan halkan riix oo ku soo biir janalka WhatsApp ee BBC Somali si aad u hesho wararkii ugu dambeeyey ee caalamka, iyo kuwa gobolka
Taariikhda malawaxa waa mid xoogaa mugdi ah oo aan si buuxda u caddayn, balse khubaradu waxay aamminsan yihiin in mulawaxu asal ahaan ka soo jeedo taariikhdii Faaris ee qadiimiga ahayd, maadaama magaca "naan" oo la mid ah malawax uu ka yimid af-Faarisiga. Waqtiyadii hore, dadka Faarisiyiinta ah waxay ka samayn jireen roodhi iyaga oo isku daraya biyo iyo bur, kaddibna waxay ku dubi jireen dhagaxyo aad u kulul.
Qarnigii 13aad ilaa 16aad, xilliyadii guulaha Islaamku ka gaadhay Hindiya, malawaxu wuxuu u gudbay Bariga Aasiya (Hindustan), sababtoo ah Muslimiintii guulaystay waxay la yimaadeen dhaqammadoodii cuntada. Sidoo kale, dadka ka yimid Aasiya Dhexe iyo Galbeed waxay wateen qalabyo waxa lagu foorneeyo.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Xigashada Sawirka, The Cleveland Museum of Art, Andrew R. and Martha Holden Jennings Fund 1971
Niha Varmani, oo si dhow ula socota taariikhda Koonfurta Aasiya, waxay sheegtay in "malawaxu uu lahaa cunto-kariye gaar ah oo si joogto ah u soo saari jiray rootiga. Tusaale ahaan, nooc ka mid ah mulwaxaas wax auu lahaa lakabyo rooti khafiif ah, halka malawaxa qaarkooda ay ay ka samaysnaayeen rooti yar oo si fiican u nuugi jiray maraqa cuntada."
Inkasta oo laga yaabo in ay kala duwan yihiin haddana, Soomaalida ayaa ka mid ah dadka aadka u jecel cuntadan malawaxa ah ee aadka u jilicdasan, islamarkaana waxa si weyn loogu cunaa subag ama malab. Waa mid ka mid ah cuntooyinka ugu caansan meelo badan oo ay Soomaalidu joogto.
Keliya subag laguma cuno ee malawaxa waxaa lagu cunaa cuntooyin kale oo badan sida hilib, fuul ama shaah.
Way adag tahay in laga waayo miisaska Soomaalida gaar ahaan xilliyada quraacda ama cashada.
Waxa laga helaa guryaha, hoteellada iyo makhaayadaha, waxaana lagu diyaariyaa bur, caano, ukum iyo saliid ama subag, iyadoo lagu dubo digsi kulul.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, waxa laga yaabaa in ay dad badan u noqoto arrin cusub in malawaxa maanta qof walba heli karo ay hore u ahaan jirtay cunto si gaar ah loogu sameeyo guryaha iyo munaasabadaha qaarkood. Haddaba, sidee ayay malawax-du uga soo baxday jikada dhaqanka una noqotay cunto maalinle ah oo miis walba taalla?

Ramadan 2026: Maxaa ku dhacaya jirkaaga marka aad saacado badan soonto 30 maalmood?
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Sanad walba, malaayiin Muslimiin ah ayaa sooma laga soo bilaabo qorrax soo baxa ilaa qorrax dhaca muddo 30 maalmood ah.
Waxaa kala duwan saacadaha soonka ee dalalka dunida. Dalalka qaar sida Norway, dadku waxay soomaan ilaa 20 saacadood, halka dalalka qaarna saacado intaa aad uga yar laga soomo.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Waxaan eegeynaa waxa ku dhacaya jirkaaga muddada 30-ka maalmood ah ee aad sooman tahay.
Xaqiiqda ayaa ah in jirku uusan si toos ah ula qabsan soonka maalmaha hore. Jirka ayaa nafaqada ka qaata cuntadii ugu dambeysay ee aad cuntay.
Wax yar kaddibna wuxuu isticmaalaa sokorta beerka ku keydsan si uu tamar uga helo. Marka sokortu idlaato waxyaabaha kale ee uu jirku tamarta ka helo ayaa ah dufanta.
Maalmaha ugu adag waa maalinta koowaad ilaa saddexaad.
Marka uu jirku bilaabo inuu gubo dufantaas, waxay sidoo kale ka caawineysaa dhimista miisaanka, waxay yareysaa dufanta jirka iyo khatarta ah in qofku ay ku dhacdo sokor. Si kastaba, sokorta jirka oo yar ayaa qofka u sababi karta inuu daciif noqdo. Xilligaas qofku wuxuu dareemataa madax xanuun iyo tabar darri.
Waa marka uu qofku dareemayo gaajo saa'id ah.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Marka uu jirkaagu la qabsado soonka, dufanta jirka ayaa isu beddesha sokor dhiigga raacda. Marka aadan biyo cabeynin soonka, habeenkii ayaa loo baahan yahay inaad cabto si aad u soo celiso biyaha ka lumay jirkaaga, haddii kale dhibaato ayay kugu noqon kartaa.
Dhammaan cunnooyinka waa inay isu dheellitirnaadaan oo ay ka koobnaadaan carbohydrates iyo dufan. Waa muhiim inaad qaadato cunto nafaqo leh isla markaana aad biyo badan cabto.
Wejiga saddexaa, jirka ayaa la qabsanaya soonka.
Dkt. Razeen Mahroof, oo ka tirsan machadka caafimaadka ee Addenbrook cmbridge ayaa sheegay inay jiraan faa'iidooyin kale oo soonku leeyahay.
"Maalmaha caadiga ah, weaxaan cunnaa cuntooyin bur u badan, tanna waxay jirka ka hor istaagi kartaa inuu si wacan u shaqeeyo."
"Tan waxaa lagu saxaa soonka sababtoo ah wuxuu u oggolaanayaa jirka inuu diiradda saaro shaqooyinka kale.
Sidaas darteed soonka ayaa jirka wuxuu ka helaa faa'iido isagoo is dayactira sidoo kalena ka hortaga oo la dagaallama caabuqyada. "
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Muddada dhexe ee soonka, jirka ayaa la qabsada dhammaanba hannaanka soonka.
Caloosha, beerka, kilyaha iyo maqaarka ayaa mara marxalad ay isaga saaraan sunta iyo khashinka.
Qoysas badan ayaa ku afura cunto aad u badan.
"Caafimaad ahaan, marxaladdan, shaqada xubnaha kala duwan waa inay si buuxda u soo laabato. Maskaxdaadu waxay u baahan tahay tamar adiguna awood badan ayaad yeelan kartaa," ayuu yiri dhaqtarka.
"Jirku nafaqada ma isticmaalo si uu tamar uga helo. Tani waa marka aad gaajo gabax la noqoto oo aad murqaha u adeegsato inaad tamar ka hesho. Xaaladdan ayaa dhacda marka aad muddo dheer soonto sida maalmo ilaa toddobaadyo."
"Maaddaama soonka uu keliya yahay qorrax soo bax ilaa qorrax dhac, waxaa jira fursado badan oo aad ku horumarin karto cuntadaada iyo biyaha si jirku uu tamar u helo. Tallaabadan ayaa badbaado u ah murqaha waxayna sidoo kale gacan ka geysataa dhimista miisaanka."
Waxaanu weydiinnay marka soonku wuxuu muhiim u yahay caafimaadka?
Dr Mahroof ayaa yiri haa balse shuruud ayaa ku xiran.
"Soonku wuu u fiican yahay caafimaadka sababtoo ah wuxuu naga caawiyaa inaan diiradda saarno waxaan cuni lahayn iyo xilliga. Si kastaba, iyadoo muddada soonka ee bisha ay fiican tahay, haddana laguma taliyo in intaas laga dheereeyo."
"In la soomo wax ka badan 30 maalmood si joogto ah ma fiicna sababtoo ah muddo dheer ayaad lumineysaa miisaan jirkaaguna wuxuu bilaabayaa inuu joojiyo inuu dufanta u beddelo tamar, wuxuuna u beddelayaa murqo. Tani waa tallaabo xun waxayna daciifisaa jirka.
Dhaqtarka ayaa ku talinaya in marka Ramadaanka laga reebo, soomidda dhowr maalmood oo ka mid ah maalmaha caadiga ah ay faa'iido u yeelan karto jirka beddelkii aad soonka sii wadi lahayd bilooyin badan oo xiriir ah.
"Soonka bisha Ramadan, haddii si sax ah loo sameeyo, waxay naga caawisaa xoojinta tamarta aan joogto u helno, taas oo ah tallaabo qofku ku dhimayo miisaanka iyadoo uusan jirku waxyeeleyn murqaha."

Waa kuma Mojtaba Khamenei, ninka laga yaabo in uu noqdo hugaamiyaha ruuxigaha ee cusub ee Iran?
Xigashada Sawirka, Tasnim News Agency
Kadib markii hogaamiyaha ruuxiga ah ee Iran Ali Khamenei lagu dilay duqeynta Mareykanka iyo Israel, dad badan ayaa is waydiiyay in wiilkiisa awooda badnaa ee Mojtaba uu isna dhintay.
Maalmo wax war ah kama soo kordhin. Laakiin Talaadadii (3-dii Maarso), warbaahinta dawladda Iran ayaa sheegtay in Mojtaba uu nool yahay oo uu ku hawlan yahay "la-tashi iyo dib u eegis lagu sameeyo arrimaha muhiimka ah ee dalka". Hase ahaatee, weli ma uusan imaan fagaare.
Mojtaba ayaa hadda loo arkaa mid safka hore kaga jira dadka badalaya aabihii, wakaaladda wararka ee Reuters ayaa ka soo xiganaysa laba il oo Iran ah. Sheegashada noocaan ah ayaa weli ah mid adag in la xaqiijiyo.
Dhanka kale, Golaha Khubarada - oo ah 88 xubnood oo culimo ah oo loo xilsaaray inay doortaan hoggaamiyaha ugu sarreeya - ayaa la sheegay inay "ku dhow yihiin gabagabo". Laakiin warkan lama filayo in la shaaciyo ka hor aaska Cali Khamenei, sida ay sheegtay wakaaladda wararka ee Fars News, taas oo xiriir la leh Ciidanka Ilaalada Kacaanka Islaamiga ah ee (IRGC).
Si ka duwan aabihiis, Mojtaba wuxuu si weyn isaga ilaaliyay muuqaalkiisu in uu meel walbo yaalo. Waligii xafiis dawladeed ma uu qaban. Mana uusan jeedin khudbado iyo wareysiyo, waxaana la daabacay sawiro iyo muuqaal kooban oo uu leeyahay.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, waxaa jira warar xan ah oo soo jireen ah oo ku saabsan saameyntiisauu ku lahaa aabihiis. Xarkaha diblumaasiyadeed ee Maraykanka, oo ay daabacday WikiLeaks dabayaaqadii 2000-meeyadii, ayaa ku tilmaantay inuu yahay "awoodda ka dambaysa maryaha" oo loo arko inuu yahay "hogaamiye karti iyo xoog leh" gudaha nidaamka, sida ay sheegtay AP.
Laakiin doorashada suurtagalka ah ee Mojtaba Khamenei ayaa noqon karta mid muran dhalisa. Jamhuuriyadda Islaamiga ah waxaa la aas aasay sanadkii 1979-kii kadib markii la riday xukunkii boqortooyada, waxaana fikirkeeda ay ku saleysan tahay in hoggaamiyaha ugu sarreeya lagu doorto mawqifkiisa diineed iyo hoggaamintiisa la xaqiijiyay, ee aan lagu dooran dhaxal.
Cali Khamenei waxa uu si guud uga hadlay hoggaanka mustaqbalka ee Jamhuuriyadda Islaamiga ah.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Khamenei ayaa ka soo horjeestay fikradda ah in Mobtaba uu yahay musharax u taagan hoggaanka mustaqbalka, xubin ka tirsan Golaha Khubarada ayaa sheegay laba sano ka hor. Laakiin waligiis si fagaare ah ugamuu hadlin mala-awaalkan oo kale.
Haddaba, waa ayo Mojtaba Khamenei?
Wuxuu ku dhashay 8 Sebtembar 1969 magaalada waqooyi bari ee Mashhad, Mojtaba waa qofka labaad ee lix carruur ah oo Khamenei dhalay. Waxbarashadiisa sare waxa uu ku qaatay dugsigii diiniga ahaa ee Alavi ee magaalada Tehran.
Isaga oo 17 jir ah, Mojtaba waxa uu ka tirsanaan jiray millatariga waqti kooban intii lagu jiray dagaalkii Iran iyo Ciraaq, sida ay sheegtay warbaahinta Iran. Iskahorimaadka dhiigga badan ku daatay ee siddeedda sano socday ayaa talisku tilmaamay shaki badan oo ay ka qabaan Maraykanka iyo reer galbeedka oo taageerayey Ciraaq.
Sannadkii 1999-kii, Mojtaba waxa uu aaday magaalada Qom, oo ah magaalo barakeysan oo loo arko xarun muhiim u ah fiqiga Shiicada, si uu u sii wato waxbarashadiisa diinta. Waxa xusid mudan in ilaa wakhtigan aanu xirnayn dharka culuumta, mana cadda sababta uu u go'aansaday in uu 30 jir u galo siminaar, maadaama ay caadi tahay in qofku marka uu ka yar yahay uu tago.
Mojtaba ayaa weli ah wadaad darajada dhexe ah, taasoo caqabad ku noqon karta noqoshadiisa hoggaamiyaha ugu sarreeya.
Xigashada Sawirka, West Asia News Agency Via Reuters
Maalmihii la soo dhaafay, qaar ka mid ah warbaahinta iyo saraakiisha ku dhow xarumaha awoodda ee Iran ayaa bilaabay inay Mojtaba Khamenei ugu yeeraan "Aayatullah", oo ah magac sare. Isbadalkan ayaa ugu muuqda qaar ka mid ah dadka indha indheeya in uu yahay mid uu ku doonayo in uu sare ugu qaado mawqifkiisa diineed oo uu u soo bandhigo in uu yahay musharax lagu kalsoonaan karo oo u taagan hogaanka sare ee dalka.
Nidaamka haysashada darajada "Aayatullah" iyo barida fasallada sare ayaa loo arkaa inay yihiin tilmaamaha heerka aqooneed iyo aqoonta qofka, waxaana loo arkaa mid ka mid ah shuruudaha xulashada hoggaamiyaha mustaqbalka.
Xilli hore, Ali Khamenei ayaa si degdeg ah loogu dallacsiiyay "Aayatullah" ka dib markii uu noqday hoggaamiyihii labaad ee ugu sarreeya 1989kii.
Magaca Mojtaba ayaa markii ugu horeysay soo shaac baxay doorashadii madaxtinimo ee 2005tii, taas oo uu ku guuleystay Mahmoud Ahmadinejad, oo ah nin aad u adag.
Waraaq furan oo uu u diray Khamenei, musharaxa isbedel doonka ah ee Mehdi Karroubi, ayaa Mojtaba ku eedeeyay in uu faragelin ku sameeyay codbixinta isagoo adeegsanaya IRGC iyo maleeshiyada Basij, kuwaas oo lacag u qaybiyay ururo diimeed si ay uga caawiyaan inuu ka guuleysto Axmadi Najad .
Afar sano ka dib, Mojtaba waxay wajahday eedayn la mid ah. Dib-u-doorashada Axmadi Najad waxay kicisay mudaaharaadyo ballaaran oo waddanka oo dhan loo yaqaanno Dhaqdhaqaaqa Cagaaran. Qaar ka mid ah dibadbaxayaasha ayaa ku dhawaaqayay erayo ay kaga soo horjeedaan fikradda ah in Mojtaba uu bedeli karo aabihiis oo ah hogaamiyaha ugu sarreeya Iran.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Mostafa Tajzadeh, oo xilligaas ahaa wasiir ku xigeenkii arrimaha gudaha, ayaa natiijada ku tilmaamay "afgambi doorasho". Waxa uu xirnaa todobo sano, taas oo uu ku sababeeyay "rabitaanka tooska ah ee Mojtaba Khamenei".
Laba musharax oo isbedel doon ah, Mir-Hossein Mousavi iyo Mehdi Karoubi, ayaa lagu riday xabsi guri kadib doorashadii 2009-kii. Bishii Febraayo 2012, Mojtaba ayaa la kulmay oo ku booriyay Mousavi inuu ka tanaasulo mudaaharaadkiisa, ilo Irani ah ayaa u sheegay BBC News Persian.
Dad badan ayaa filaya in Mojtaba uu sii wadi doono siyaasadaha qalafsan ee aabihiis hadii uu noqdo badalka. Qaar ayaa sidoo kale aaminsan in ninka aabihiis, hooyadiis iyo xaaskiisa ku waayey duqeymaha Mareykanka iyo Israa'iil aysan u badneyn inuu u hoggaansamo cadaadiska reer galbeedka.
Balse waxa uu wajihi lahaa hawl aad u adag oo ah xaqiijinta jiritaanka Jamhuuriyadda Islaamiga ah iyo in uu shacabka ka dhaadhiciyo in uu yahay qofka saxda ah ee dalka u horseedi kara in uu dalka ka saaro burbur siyaasadeed iyo mid dhaqaale.
Taariikhdiisa hoggaamineed ayaa weli ah mid aan la tijaabin, iyo aragtida ah in jamhuuriyadda ay isu beddeshay hab la iska dhaxlo ayaa sii kordhin karta dareenka dadweynaha.
Haddii la doorto, Mojtaba wuxuu noqon doonaa nin calaamadsan - sida wasiirka gaashaandhigga Israa'iil uu sheegay in qofka beddelaya uu noqon doono "bartilmaameed aan mugdi ku jirin oo la ciribtirayo".

5 cudur oo qofka ku dhici kara marka timaha la xiirayo ama la tidcayo
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Timaha oo loo xiiro ama loo jaro dumarka iyo raggaba waa mid ay dad badani u baahan yihiin si ay u ilaaliyaan nadaafadda, caafimaadka, iyo quruxda.
Qaar baa timaha xiira toddobaad kasta ama bil kasta, qaar kalena marar badan, laakiin qof kastaa wuxuu leeyahay waqti u gaar ah oo uu ku xiirto timaha.
Laakiin mararka qaarkood, hababka saxda ah looma raaco.
Haddii aan nadaafadda iyo caafimaadka laga fiirsan, khubaradu waxay ka digayaan in cudurro badan ay faafi doonaan.
Marar badan dadku waxay ka welwelaan qaabka iyo quruxda ay gaari doonaan xiirashada ka dib, iyada oo aan loo eegin qalabka loo isticmaalo.
Inkasta oo ay hadda jiraan qalab casri ah oo timaha lagu xiiro, haddana waxa jirta khatarta ah in ay faafiyaan cudurro la mid ah kuwii hore oo ay dadku isticmaali jireen sakiin, maqas, iyo mindiyo yaryar.
Khatarta ah in cudurro lagu qaado timo jaraha ama saloonka ayaa aad u sarreysa haddii aan la ilaalin nadaafadda qalabka.

"Cudurkani wuxuu keenaa in timaha madaxa ay noqdaan kuwo qallafsan, ka dibna wuxuu keenaa in qofku uu bilaabo inuu timaha lumiyo".
Cudurkan waxa kale oo lagu kala qaadaa dhiiga. Dr. Sani waxa uu sharaxay in mandiilada (sakiimaha) oo aan la beddelin ama aan la nadiifin qalabka xiirashada ay faafiyaan jeermiska cudurkan.
HIV/AIDS: Inkastoo aysan sahlaneyn, haddana Dr. Sani ayaa sheegay in ay suuragal tahay in cudurka AIDS-ka uu ku dhaco haddii qof cudurka qaba lagu gooyo sakiin kadibna qalabka uu isticmaalo qof kale.

Finan: Inkasta oo xanuunkani aanu xiriir toos ah la lahayn xiirashada, haddana waxa uu dhakhtarku sheegay in laga yaabo inuu ka timaado shukumaannada wasakhaysan ama qalabka xiiridda.
Dr. Sani waxa uu sharaxay in loo baahan yahay in aad iska hubiso in aad isticmaasho mandiil cusub marka aad xiirayso, in qalabka wax lagu xiirto la nadiifiyo ka hor inta aan la isticmaalin, in aanad xiirin meel nabar ah, waalidiintu waa in ay ka taxadaraan caruurtooda inta ay bogsanayaan, iyo in ay wanaagsan tahay in aad adigu leedahay qalabka xiirashada.

Sawirro: Jimcihii ugu horreeyay Ramadaanka iyo Muslimiinta dunida
Dad ka kala yimi Daanta Galbeed oo u socday inay ku soo tukadaan salaaddii Jimcaha ee ugu horreysay bishan Ramadaan, barxadaha Masjidka barakeysan ee Al-Aqsa ayaa la kulmay caqabado badan, oo ay ka mid ahaayeen sugitaan dheer oo ka jiray isgoysyada ay maamusho Israa'iil, iyo sidoo kale shuruud ah in oggolaansho la helo si aaggaas loo galo.
Wakaaladda wararka Falastiiniyiinta ee WAFA ayaa sheegtay in ciidamada Israa'iil ay ka hor istaageen kumannaan cibaadaysan lahaa, oo raby in ay gaadhaan Masaajidka Aqsa, halka kumannaan kale dib looga celiyay isgoyska Qalandiya ee waqooyiga Qudus Bari, iyo isgoyska loo yaqaan (300) ee u dhexeeya magaalooyinka Qudus iyo Baytulaxam (Bethlehem).
WAFA waxay sheegtay in qiyaastii 80,000 oo qof ay ku tukadeen salaaddii Jimcaha ee ugu horreysay Ramadaantan barxadaha Al-Aqsa, inkastoo ay jirayeen waxa ay ku tilmaantay "xayiraado iyo tallaabooyin adag oo ay soo rogtay Israa'iil."
Dowladda Israa'iil ayaa ku dhawaaqday inay bixin doonto kaliya 10,000 oggolaansho oo loo qoondeeyay Falastiiniyiinta ku nool Daanta Galbeed ee la haysto si ay uga qaybgalaan salaadaha Jimcaha ee Ramadaan. Oggolaanshahan waxaa lagu xaddiday haweenka ka weyn 50 sano, ragga ka weyn 55 sano, iyo carruurta ka yar 12 sano.

Yuu ka hor dhamaan karaa hubka,ma Iraan mise Mareykanka iyo Israa'iil?
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Iyadoo dagaalka ay Mareykanka iyo Israel kula jiraan Iran uu galay maalintiisii lixaad, saadaasha badan ee ku saabsan suurtagalnimada xabbad-joojin ama degganaansho ayaa inta badan diiradda saaray awoodda milatari ee dhinacyada dagaallamaya si ay dagaalka u sii wadaan, halkii ay xoogga saari lahaayeen waddooyinka diblomaasiyadeed.
Borobagaandada dagaalka waxay ku khasabtaa labada dhinac inay aad uga taxaddaraan sida ay u soo bandhigayaan awooddooda difaac iyo weerar, mararka qaarkoodna xitaa way buunbuuniyaan.
Warbixintan waxay isku dayaysaa inay dib u eegto xaaladda, kana gudubto hal-ku-dhegyada iyo borobagaandada labada dhinac ee dagaalka, si ay uga jawaabto qaar ka mid ah su'aalaha weli taagan ee ku saabsan heerka iyo sii socoshada dagaalkan.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Jamhuuriyadda Islaamiga ah ee Iran, oo dhowr bilood ka hor ku lug lahayd waxa loogu yeero "Dagaalkii 12-ka Maalmood", isla markaana la kulantay weerarro culus, ayaa shantii maalmood ee la soo dhaafay muujisay in, inkastoo awoodda difaac iyo weerar culus ee Mareykanka iyo sidoo kale Israel, ay weli awood u leedahay inay waxyeello gaarsiiso danaha Mareykanka iyo xulafadiisa.
Hay'adda sirdoonka difaaca ee Mareykanka, Defense Intelligence Agency, ayaa sanadkii 2019 ku dhawaaqday in Iiraan ay haysato kaydka gantaallada ugu weyn ahna noocyo kala duwan ee Bariga Dhexe oo dhan. Ku dhawaad toddobo sano ayaa ka soo wareegay markaas, inkastoo Iiraan ay isticmaashay qayb ka mid ah gantaalladeeda muddadan, haddana waxaa la aaminsan yahay in kayd badan uu weli jiray ka hor bilowga dagaalkan.
Ka hortagga kaydkan gantaallada ah waa hawsha ugu weyn ee nidaamyada difaaca gantaallada ee Mareykanka sida THAAD iyo Patriot, kuwaas oo loogu talagalay inay qabtaan oo burburiyaan gantaallada soo rido.
Khabiir sirdoon milatari ah ayaa u sheegay BBC Persian in Iran ay celcelis ahaan ridday 25 gantaal ballistic ah saacaddii tan iyo markii uu bilaabmay dagaalka, iyadoo u muuqata inay isku dayayso inay daaliso nidaamyada difaaca hawada ee Israel, Mareykanka, iyo xulafada gobolka.
Sida ku cad tirakoobka Center for Strategic and International Studies, Mareykanka wuxuu isticmaalay 150 gantaal oo THAAD ah si uu u difaaco Israel intii lagu jiray dagaalka socday 12 maalmood.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
THAAD waa nidaamka kaliya ee difaaca gantaallada ee Mareykanka oo awood u leh inuu burburiyo gantaallada ballistic-ga ah ee riddada gaaban, dhexdhexaadka iyo kuwa riddada dheer.
Mareykanka wuxuu sidoo kale gobolka geeyay nidaamyo dheeraad ah oo difaaca hawada ah, oo ay ku jiraan nidaamyada Patriot, balse labaduba waa qaali isla markaana tiradoodu xaddidan tahay.
April 2024, warbixin uu daabacay Bloomberg ayaa sheegtay in ay ku kacayso in ka badan $1 bilyan saacaddii si loo joojiyo gantaallada iyo diyaaradaha aan duuliyaha lahayn ee Iran.
Sida ay qabaan khubarada milatariga, waxaa si cad u jira farqi dhaqaale oo weyn oo u dhexeeya kharashka weerarka iyo difaaca ee u dhexeeya Iran iyo Mareykanka.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, burburka weyn ee gaaray kaabeyaasha Iran afartan maalmood gudahood ayaa si weyn miisaanka ugu leexinaya dhinaca khasaaraha dhaqaale ee Iran ama waxa ka haraya dhaqaalahooda marka dagaalkani dhammaado.
Jonathan Hackett, oo hore uga tirsanaa sirdoonka US Marine Corps isla markaana sanado badan baarayay awoodaha milatari ee Iran, wuxuu qiyaasayaa in tirada ugu macquulsan ee kaydka gantaallada Iran ay tahay 3,000.
Wuxuu sheegay in qaybta ugu weyn ee kaydkan ay ka kooban tahay gantaallo ballistic ah oo riddo gaaban iyo kuwa dhexdhexaad ah. Wuxuu intaas ku daray in gantaallada masaafada dheer, kuwaas oo gaari kara Badda Mediterranean hal dhinac iyo Yemen dhinaca kale, ay aad uga yar yihiin tiradooda, isla markaana ay qaadato bilo in mid kasta la dhiso—gaar ahaan maadaama Mareykanka uusan si ballaaran u beegsan kaabeyaasha gantaallada ee Iran.
Laakiin difaaca ka dhanka ah gantaallada ama drones-ka Iran ma aha dagaal hal-gantaal oo hal-gantaal lagu qabto.
Si loo joojiyo oo loo burburiyo hal gantaal, waxaa badanaa loo baahan yahay 2 ilaa 3 gantaal oo ah nidaamyada difaaca gantaallada. Arrintan ayaa dhalisay walaac ka jira Washington, taas oo Donald Trump uu isku dayay inuu ka hadlo shalay.
"Meeleyaasha ay gantaallada ka ridaan waa la burburiyay, gantaalladooduna way sii dhammaanayaan. Rasaasta (hubka) masaafo-dhexe iyo midda ka sarreysa ee annaga noo taalla waa aan xad lahayn. Waxay sii wadi doonaan inay gantaallo ridaan muddo yar oo kale. Laakiin gantaalladoodu way sii yaraanayaan, sidoo kale meelihii ay ka ridi lahaayeena way sii dhammaanayaan sababtoo ah meelihii laga ridi jiray waa la burburiyay," ayuu yiri Donald Trump, madaxweynaha Mareykanka, wareysi uu siiyay Politico Talaadadii, Maarso 3.
Wuxuu sidoo kale sheegay in warshadaha difaaca ee Mareykanka ay xawaare buuxa ku soo saarayaan hubka loo baahan yahay.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, Kelly Grieco oo ka tirsan machadka Stimson ayaa u sheegay jariidada Fortune: "Waxaan isticmaaleynaa gantaallo ka hortag ah xawaare ka badan inta aan buuxin karno meelihii ka banaanaa."
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Jonathan Hackett wuxuu sheegay in haddii tirakoobka kaydka gantaallada Iran uu sax yahay, haddii dalka uu sii wado isticmaalka gantaalladiisa xawaaraha ay hadda ku socdaan, "waxay gantaallo ka dhamaan doonaan qiyaastii toddobaad gudihiis. Taasi waxay dhici doontaa ka hor inta aanay dhibaato dhab ah ka dhalan gantaallada difaaca ee Mareykanka iyo Israel."
Wuxuu saadaaliyay in Iran ay u badan tahay inay hoos u dhigto qaabka gantaallada ay u rido, isla markaana ay u leexato isticmaalka ku dhawaad 80,000 drones oo ay lahayd ka hor inta uusan dagaalku bilaaban.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee, ma u arko arrintan mid sahlan: "Heerka wax-soo-saarka drones-ka ee Iran waa mid aad u sarreeya, waxayna soo saari kartaa ku dhawaad 400 drones bishii, haddii kaabeyaasha la heli karo. Laakiin haddii aad eegto liiska goobaha ay Mareykanka iyo Israel beegsadeen maalmahan u dambeeyay.
Markii aan weydiiyay haddii xaddidaadaha nidaamyada difaaca gantaallada ee Mareykanka ay qasbi karaan dalka inuu beddelo istaraatiijiyadda ama xeeladaha dagaalka, wuxuu yiri: "Waxaa la malayn karaa xaalad uu tirada kaydka hubka Mareykanka go'aamiso jihada istaraatiijiga, laakiin dhab ahaan ma jiraan xaalad uu dawladaha Iran haysto gantaallo ballistic, drones, iyo awoodaha taageerada ee ku filan inay xitaa u dhowaato qodobkaas."
Laakiin taasi ma aha dhammaad. Sanado badan, Mareykanka wuxuu ciidamada qaar ka dhigay kuwa saaranmaraakiib iyo bakhaaro khaas ah oo ku kala yaalla adduunka si, haddii loo baahdo, si degdeg ah loogu soo diro hub iyo qalab cusub jiidda hore.
Tani waxay ka dhigan tahay haddii nooc ka mid ah gantaal difaac ama weerar la isticmaalo ka badan kuwa kale inta uu dagaalka socdo, Mareykanka waxaa uu markiiba uu dib u buuxin karaa si ka dhaqso badan sidii caadiga ahayd, ama wuxuu u wareegi karaa hub iyo habab kale, isagoo cadaadis dagaal saaraya nidaamyada kale.
Shanta maalmood ee la soo dhaafay, saraakiisha difaaca ee Mareykanka ayaa sidoo kale ka hadlay awoodahooda "qarsoon" ee la xiriira ka hortagga gantaalada Iran.
Jonathan Hackett wuxuu sheegay in ereyadaas badanaa loo isticmaalo marka laga hadlayo awoodaha dhanka cyber‑ka iyo hawada sare ee Mareykanka. Wuxuu tusaale u soo qaatay sida nidaamyada isgaarsiinta iyo difaaca ee Venezuela looga "loo indha-saabay" ka hor intii aan lagu duulin si Nicolás Maduro loo qabto — islamarkaana uu sheegay in Mareykanku horey u isticmaalay awoodo noocaas ah.
Wuxuu yiri: "Haddii Mareykanku jebin karo GPS‑ka ama carqaladeyn karo nidaamka hagidda si gantaallada Iran aysan si sax ah u gaarin bartilmaameedyadooda, gantaalladaas waxay noqonayaan kuwa aan waxtar lahayn, xitaa haddii la rido. Drones‑kana aad bay ugu nugul yihiin carqaladaynta noocaas ah." Wuxuuna intaas ku daray in Mareykanku u muuqdo inuusan weli si buuxda u aqoonsan in xaaladdu ay tahay mid aad u daran, taasoo loo baahan yahay in si buuxda loo isticmaalo dhammaan qalabkan dhanka cyber‑ka iyo hawada sare.

Caadada ku salaysan in la uleeyo dadka lagu helo khaladaad ka baxsan dhaqamada bulshada
Dhaqan ahaan, edbinta iyo tarbiyeynta caruurta gabar ama wiil waxaa masuul ka ah aabbaha iyo hooyada reerka, waa in ay waaniyaan oo wax u sheegaan inta ay awoodaan, haddii arrintu ka baxdo gacantooda, waxa ay u gudubtaa beesha, dhaqanka noocaan ah waxaa loo yaqaan "'Friend's room", waxaana caado u leh qabiilka Guji oo kamid qabiillada Itoobiya.
Mudane Magarsa Baddacha waa oday ka tirsan degmadda Adoola Woyyu. Sida uu sheegay, waa hab-dhaqameed ay beesha ku ciqaabto qofka dembi sameeya.
"Aabbaha iyo hooyadu waa ay waaninaayaan wiilkooda ama gabadhooda, way edbinayaan, si habboonna way u barbaariyaan. Haddii ilmuhu ka baxo awooddooda ama uu diido talada, kuna kaco falal xad-dhaaf ah, markaas ciqaabtu waxay noqotaa mid beeleed," ayuu yiri.
Ka hor inta aan la ciqaabin, odayaasha beeshu waxa ay mar ama laba mar u yeeraan qofka khaladka galay, haddii uu sii wado inuu sameeyo waxii lagala hadlay, waxa la yiraahdaa 'Friend's room ayaa la galinayaa, waxaana lagu garaacaa ul (harcumme).
"Beeshu laba ama saddex jeer ayay ilmaha la fariisataa oo la waaniyaa, balse haddii uu diio talada. Markaas aabbaha, adeerka, walaalaha iyo qabiilka ayaa wada baxa, dhammaanna dhabarka ayay ul kaga garaacaan," ayuu yiri.
Dhaqan ahaan, qofka la ciqaabayo xitaa haddii lagu qabto goobta, kabaha iyo dharka ayaa laga bixiyaa, ul ayaana lala dhacaa.
Boru Meshii, oo ku dhashay kuna barbaaray degmadda Malka Soodda ee Galbeedka Guji, ayaa ka sheekeeya ciqaabta uu kala kulmay qolka ciqaabta xilligii caruurnimada.
"Tani waa habka uu Guji ku hago kuna barbaariyo wiilkiisa. Wiilku waa sida aabbaha; haddii uu ka baxo xeerka aabbaha, wuxuu u gudbaa qabiilka."
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
"Tani waa qaab dhaqan qofka reer Guji uu barbaariyo kuna hago wiilkiisa, waiilku waa inuu ahaadaa sida aabaha, haddii uu ka gudbo xeerka aabaha waxaa uu u gudbayaa qabiilka".
Boru, markii uu ahaa dugsiga hoose ayuu dambi galay kadib markii uu ka cararay iskuulka waxa uuna maray ciqaabtiisii.
"Waxaan ka baxay fasalka lixaad, waxaana aaday wabiga oo dahab ka raadin jiray aabbahay arrinta u sheegay reerka, waa ay ii yimaadeyn, waxa ayna igu waaniyeen inaan dugsiga ku laabto. Sannad ka dib ayaan mar kale baxay oo halkii ku noqday.
"Markaas ayay beeshii iigu yimaadeyn webigii aan dahabka ka raadinayay, wayna i kaxeeyeen. Waxay yiraahdeen: 'Wiilkan waxaan ku waaninay inuu jidka saxda ah ku laabto, balse waa uu diiday talada oo isla falalkii ayuu ku noqday; sidaas darteed Qolka ciqaabta ayaan geeneynaa".
Boru, oo xusuusanaya in guriga aabbihiis dhabarka ul lagula garaacay, ayaa sheegay in la garaacay ilaa dhabarkiisu uu ka gaduuto oo dhiig u ekaaday.
"Aad ayaan u xanaaqay, maxaa dadkan oo dhan iigu soo wada baxayn? Markii ay garaacista dhammeeyeen,kofee iyo subag ayey dhabarka ii mariyeen, waxa ayna igu waaniyeen inaan dib ugu laabto iskuulka oo aan waxbarashada ku noqdo," ayuu yidhi.
Dhaqankan ayaa marka hore u eg adag oo fogeenaya caruurta, balse waa mid faa'iido badan leh sida uu Boru qabo.
"Falkaa si weyn ayuu ii anfacay, hadda waan fahmay in dadkaasi aysan ii garaacin si ay dhibaateeyaan. Xitaa garaacista ka dib waxay kuu sheegayaan wanaagga, wayna ku waaniyaan."
Isagoo ka duulaya wixii ku dhacay, Boru wuxuu leeyahay dhaqanka Qolka ciqaabta waa mid bulshada ka sifaysa falalka bani-aadanimo ka baxsan, ubadkana dib ugu soo celinaya jidka saxda ah.
Ciqaabta Qolkaan waxa ay ku saleesan tahay qofka qaadan waaya waana waalidka ama sameeya falal anshaxa ka baxsan sida: diidmada talada qoyska iyo qabiilka, xadgudubka waalidiinta, ku takri-falidda xaaska, iyo xirir kalmo lala yeesho qof qaraabada dhaw ah.
Ciqaabtan mararka qaar hal qof ayay ku koobnaan kartaa, halka waqtiyo kanala ay wada maraan dadkii dembiga galay. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, ciqaabtan waxa la fulinayaa marka beesha ay u aragto inay lama huraan tahay.
Habkan edbinta Qolka ciqaabta, qofka ay beesha ku garaacdo ul caleemo leh, ma laha rafcaan ama dacwad xitaa haddii uu dhaawac jidheed soo gaaro, inasta oo Kuwa garaacaya aysan gaarsiineyn dhaawac halis ah, maadaama ujeeddadu tahay wax-barid, sida ay yiraahdeen.
Sida dhaqanka Guji yahay, ilmaha waxaa waaniya, edbiya, kana saxaya aabbaha iyo hooyada. Haddii uu ka sii gudbo, beesha ayaa waanisa; haddii uu haddana ka gudbo, Qolka ciqaabta ayuu marayaa. Qof kasta oo weli sii wada falal bani-aadanimo ka baxsan xitaa ka dib Qolkaas waxa uu mutaystaa ciqaabta ugu dambaysa ee ah ka saarid qabiil.
Dhaqankani waa sharci-darro. Sharciga Itoobiya ma taageero ciqaab jidheed oo loo geysto carruur ama cid kale, laakiin dowladdu, ma cadda waxa ay ka qabanayso joojinta dhaqankan.

Saamaynta uu dagaalka Iran ku yeeshay mid kamid ah ganacsiyada ugu wayn Itoobiya
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Xiisadda ka taagan Bariga Dhexe waxay saamayn xooggan ku yeelatay duulimaadyadii ay samayn jireen shirkadaha diyaaradaha. Mid ka mid ah shirkadaha uu khasaarugu soo gaadhay waa shirkadda Ethiopian Airlines.
Madaxa ganacsiga ee shirkadda, Lemma Yadecha, ayaa BBC u sheegay in dagaalka u dhexeeya Mareykanka, Israa'iil iyo Iiraan oo galay maalintiisii lixaad uu dhaawac weyn ku keenayo hawlaha shirkadda iyo duullimaadyadii ay ku tagi jirtay waddamda ku yaalla Bariga Dhexe iyada oo qaada rakaab iyo noocyao kala duwan oo xammuul ah.
"Duullimaadyadii aanu ku tagi jirnay ilaa 10 magaalo oo ku yaalla Bariga Dhexe ayaan joojinnay laga soo bilaabo maalintii Sabtidii ee todobaadkan."
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Duullimaadyada la joojiyay waxa ka mid ah saddex duullimaad oo ay shirkaddaasi maalin walba ku tagi jirtay Dubai, halka Sharjah ay u duuli jirtay hal mar maalintii.
Si la mid ah waxa joogsaday saddex kale oo ay ku tagi jirtay Tel Aviv iyo isku darka saddex goor oo si maalinle ah ay rakaabka ugu qaadaysay magaalooyinka Abu Dhabi Cammaan.
Sida ay masuuliyiinta shirkadaasi sheegayaanna waxa ay taasi la micne tahay in gebi ahaanba ay joogsadeen 15 duullimaad oo ay samayn jirtay, taasi oo ay ka dhasheen saamayn dhaqaale oo laxaad leh.
" Si guud waxa aan luminnay 15 duulimaad oo aan maalin kasta ku tagi jirnay Bariga Dhexe. Waxa oo joojiinnay 100 duullimaad oo si todobaale ah aan u samayn jirnay. Dhinaca xammuulka waxa aanu qasnbanaanaynaa in aan joojinno in ka badan 160 duullimaad. Qiyaastii 40 kun ilaa 50 kun oo rakaab ah ayaan qaadi jirnay, in la waayana waxa nooga dhigan tahay khasaaare laxaad leh."
Marka laga hadlayo duulimaadyada xamuulka, mas'uuliyiintu waxay sheegeen in maalin kasta hal duulimaad loo qorsheyay meel kasta oo ka mid ah meelahii hore loogu duuli jiray.
Warbixinada qotada dheer iyo wararka BBC Somali oo toos kuugu imanaaya WhatsApp.
Ma aha keliya in ay lumiyeen rakaabkii ay qaadi jireen, laakiin se dhinaca kale shirkaddu waxay khasaari kartaa qiyaastii 135 milyan oo doollar oo ka so xeroon jiray rakaabka iyo laba milyan oo ahaa lacagaha ka yimaadda alaabaha ay qaadayso
Saamayn kale oo aan la dhalayalsan karin waxa ay ka dhalatay kor-u-kaca dhinaca shidaalka dalalka Bariga Dhexe ay soo saari jireen.
"Shidaalka ugu badan ee caalamku aaggan ayuu ka yimaaddaa. Haddii aanu aaggaasi xasiloonayna waxa kor u qaadaysaaa walaaca aanu qabno. Taasi waxa ay dhibaato ku tahay dhammaan shirkadadaha duullimaadyada oo ay ku jirto shirkadda duullimaadyada ee Itoonbiya. "
Dagaalka u dhexeeya Mareykanka iyo Israa'iil iyo dhinaca kale Iiraan ayaa si weyn u carqaladeeyay safarrada hawada ee Bariga Dhexe, waxaana uu saameeyay dhaqdhaqaaqa boqollaal kun oo qof.
Lama saadaalin karo sida uu xaalku noqon doono maalmaha soo socda lama na hubo sida ay laga yeeli doono duulimaadyada dalalka Bariga Dhexe.
Khubaro ay la hadashay Wakaaladda Faransiiska ee Agence France-Presse (AFP) ayaa sheegay in carqaladaha duulimaadyadu ay sii socon karaan maalmaha iyo toddobaadyada soo socda.
Walaac kale oo la qabo waa haddii ay dalalka Khaliijka ay qaadaan tallaabooyin aargoosi ah, dagaalku wuu sii fidi karaa, taas oo saameyn ku yeelan karta duulimaadyada caalamiga ah.
Waxa kale oo la saadaalinayaa in haddii waddadamada Bariga Dhexe ay sii wadaan xidhditaanka hawooyinkooda, isla markaana dagaalku aanu joogsan, rakaabka ka safraya Khaliijka una socda Yurub, Afrika iyo Aasiya in ay la kulmi karaan caqabado dheeraad ah.

Wax ka ogow garoomada kubadda cagta ee ugu weyn qaaradda Afrika
Xigashada Sawirka, BBC Via Stadiumdb
Afrika kor ayey u sii socotaa. Ma ahan oo kaliya dhinaca dhaqanka iyo hibada, balse sidoo kale dhanka kaabayaasha casriga ah.
Garoon kasta waxa uu gudbinayaa sheeko ku saabsan dad isku yimaada, iyo kobaca aan la joojin karin ee qaaraddan.
Afrika ma aha oo kaliya meel laga helo hibada kubadda cagta ee sidoo kale waxay leedahay garoomo waaweyn oo sii xoojiya taariikhda ay qaaradda ku leedahay ciyaaraha.
Qoraalkan wuxuu diiradda saaraya garoomada ugu waaweyn ee abid laga dhisay Afrika iyadoo lagu salaynayo tirada taageerayaasha ama daawadayaasha ay qaadi karaan.
Xigashada Sawirka, Stadium Management South Africa
Garoonkan wuxuu ku yaal magaalada Johannesburg ee dalka Koonfur Afrika, waana kan ugu weyn qaaradda.
Qaabkiisa wuxuu u egyahay sida weelka, waxa uuna caan ku noqday markii uu martigeliyay final-kii Koobka Adduunka 2010-kii. Waxaa dib loo dhisay oo la ballaariyay 2009-kii ka hor Koobka Adduunka, wuxuuna qaadi kara 94,736 taageerayal ah.
Garoonka waxa uu sidoo kale hoyi u yahay kooxda Kaizer Chiefs ee horyaalka Koonfur Afrika, sidoo kale wuxuu martigeliyaa kulamada muhiimka ah ee xulka qaranka.
Magaca FNB wuxuu ka yimid First National Bank, balse inta badan waxaa loo yaqaan magaalada kubbada cagta. Garoonku wuxuu si rasmi ah u furmay 7 Oktoobar 1989.
Garoonka Misr, oo sidoo kale loo yaqaan Garoonka Caalamiga ah ee Masar, waa mid ka mid ah kuwa ugu waaweyn Afrika.
Wuxuu ku yaallaa magaalada Qaahira, waxaana lagu qabtay ciyaaro gudaha iyo kuwa caalami ah, oo ay ku jiraan AFCON. Taageerayaal gaaraya 93,940 ayaa si raaxo leh ugu fadhiisan kara.
Garoonkan wuxuu leeyahay kaabayaal casri ah, caws tayo sare leh, iyo jawi xamaasad leh marka kulamo waaweyn la ciyaarayo.
Xigashada Sawirka, The Arab Contractors
Garoonka Borg El-Arab wuxuu galay kaalinta saddexaad marka la eego cabbirka. Wuxuu ku yaallaa Amreya, wuxuuna qaadi karaa 86,000 daawade.
Waxaa loo dhisay tijaabadii Koobka Adduunka ee 2010-kii, wuxuuna noqday mid ka mid ah garoomada ugu muhiimsan Masar.
Garoonkan wuxuu ku yaalaa DR Congo, xulka qaranka ayaana ku ciyaarayay ilaa iyo 1990-meeyadii. Wuxuu qaadi karaa 80,000 qof.
Magaca garoonka wuxuu xusuus u yahay wasiirro lagu dilay 2 Juun 1966-dii magaalada Leopoldville ee hadda loo yaqaan Kinshasa.
Garoonku wuxuu sidoo kale martigeliyay munaasabado aan kubbad la xiriirin oo ay ku jirto salaaddii Pope Francis ee 2023-kii.
Garoonkan wuxuu qaadi karaa ku dhawaad 75,000 oo daawadeyaal ah. Inkasta oo uu ka yar yahay Borg el-Arab, haddana waa garoonka qaranka.
Waxaa lagu qabtay final-kii AFCON 2019-kii, iyo final-kii CAF ee 2020-kii ee u dhexeeyay Al Ahly iyo El Zamalek, halkaas oo Al Ahly 2-1 guusha ku raacday.
Garoonkan wuxuu ku yaal Casablanca dalka Morocco, waxaa la furay sanadkii 1955, waa hoyga naadiyada Raja Casablanca, Wydad Casablanca iyo xulka qaranka Morocco.
Garoonka waxaa la dayactiray 2015-kii markaas oo dib u habeyn weyn lagu sameeyay.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Garoonka kubbadda cagta ee Muqdisho waxa uu ka weyn yahay kuwa ku yaal dalalka Kenya, Tanzania iyo Uganda. Wuxuu qaadi karaa ilaa 67,000 taageerayaal ah.
Intii lagu jiray dagaalkii sokeeye ee Soomaaliya, garoonku si weyn ayuu u burburay, kaddibna waxaa xero ciidan ka dhigtay ciidamo shisheeye ee dalka jooga.
Garoona ayaa si buuxda dib loogu dhisay, waxaana la dhigay caws macmal ah 27 Maarso 2020-kii.
Garoonka kubbada cagta Muqdisho waxaa la dhisay sanadkii 1977-dii xilligii dowladdii militeriga, waxaana dhismahiisa gacan ka geystay injineerro Shiine u dhashay.
Ciyaartii ugu horreysay ee lagu qabtay waxay ahayd 1978-dii ee dhexmartay xulka Soomaaliya iyo kooxda Shiinah ee Leonen.
Garoonka Algeria waxaa loo bixiyay 5 July 1962, waa maalintii Algeria ka xoroowday Faransiiska.
Garoonka waxa uu qaadi karaa 65,000 qof, inkastoo markii hore uu qaadi jiray ilaa 110,000 oo qof. Waxaa lagu qabtay ciyaaro caalami ah sida Pan Arab Games 2004 iyo All-Africa Games 2007.
Balse waxaa jira warar sheegaya in dib u habeyn lagu samehynayo si loo kordhiyo tirada uu qaado oo looga dhigo ilaa iyo 80-kun.
Garoonkan wuxuu caan ku yahay ciyaaraha ragbiga, gaar ahaan guushii Koobka Adduunka 1995. Xulka kubadda cagta Koonfur Afrika ayaa sidoo kale halkaas ku ciyaaray ka hor furitaanka FNB Stadium.
Nelson Mandela ayaa ku qabtay ciyaar samafal ah oo Liverpool dheeleysay. Mandela wuxuu noqotay markaas kaddib taageero Liverpool.
Garoonka waxaa la furay sanadkii 2003-dii, wuxuuna qaadi karaa 60,491 taageerayaal ah. Waa hoyga horyaalka gudaha iyo xulka qaranka Nigeria.
Sanadkii 2006-dii ayuu madaxweynaha go'aansaday in lagu qabto munaasabad diimeed halkii lagu qaban lahaa ciyaar caalami ah oo u dhexeysay Nigeria iyo Rwanda.
Dhismihii ugu qaalisanaa ee laga dhiso Nigeria ayuu ahaa markii la dhisayay garoonka Abuja waqtigaas.
Garoonkan waxaa la dhisay sanadkii 2001-dii, wuxuuna caan ku noqday markii uu martigeliyay ciyaarihii Mediterranean-ka Games isla sanadkaas.
labo sano kaddib waxaa lagu qabtay garoonka ciyaaraha qaramada Afrika. Tunisia ayaa ku guuleysatay AFCON sanadkii 2004 garoonkaas.
Xigashada Sawirka, Eastafricantube.com
Waa garoonka ugu weyn Tanzania, waxa uuna saldhig u yahay naadiyada Aifa Stars, Simba SC, iyo Young Africans SC.
Waxaa si rasmi ah loo furay 2007-dii, wuxuuna martigeliyay ciyaaro taariikhi ah.
Garoonka Benjamin Mkapa waxaa ku baxday dhismahiisa $56 milyan, waxaana naqshadeeyay shirkad Koonfur Afrika laga leeyahay.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Garoonkan waxaa loo yaqaan Garoonka Kasarani. Dhismahiisa ayaa la bilaabay kaddib markii madaxweyne Daniel Arap Moi uu ka codsaday Shiinaha in ay ka caawiyaan maalgelinta garoonka sanadkii 1980-kii, waxaana dhismaha la bilaabay 1982-dii.
Waxaa la furay 1987, wuxuuna martigeliyay tartamo waaweyn oo caalami ah sida koobka addudunka ee da'da ka yar 18 iyo kulamo kale.
Dib-u-habayn ayaa lagu sameeyay sanadkii 2024-kii taas oo keentay in tirada hoos loo dhigo oo ay noqoto 55,000.
Xigashada Sawirka, Getty Images
Kenya, Tanzania, iyo Uganda ayaa ku jira tartan ku saabsan dhismaha garoomo casri ah oo lagu qaban karo kulamo caalami ah.
Garoomada ay dhisteen dalalkaas ayaa loo diyaarinayaa martigelinta ciyaaraha AFCON ee 2027, taasoo muujinaysa horumarka sii kordhaya ee kaabayaasha Afrika.
